programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Kevin Richardson (Backstreet Boys), Seth Greene
programme.desc: The Backstreet Boys' Kevin & Trishelle from Real World Las Vegas get caught in building security. Seth Green gets stung when Ashton's celeb craps game gets raided. Punk'd takes over a tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV) NO: Jessica Biel, Jessica Simpson, Nick Lachey
programme.desc: Charges are threatened on unsuspecting Jessica Biel when she agrees to watch a fan's kid, Jessica Simpson's long-lost relatives show up on her doorstep asking for money and customers are treated badly by valets when they come to pick up their cars.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan O'Malley
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel viser sinnssykt morsomme Redneck Good Times, Nutflix og Double Whammies. Ryan O'Malley, hoppestokkmester, viser frem sportens gode og dårlige sider, og du får se hvorfor du aldri bør snu ryggen til en lama!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Johnny Knoxville
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville hjelper Rob med å presentere Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts og Poorly Placed Kid, og du får vite hvorfor fugler aldri er dine venner, spesielt ikke om de har nebb lange nok til å nå hjernen din gjennom nesa!

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Black
programme.desc: Robs tidligere medspiller Big Black slutter seg til panelet og ser på Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair og Coming in Hot. Se hvordan menneske-skorpioner stikker på en helt annen måte enn edderkoppen som angriper en uskyldig far.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Travis Pastrana
programme.desc: Motorsportsstjernen Travis Pastrana hjelper Rob med å presentere Poorly Placed Trees og Whiskey Throttles. Rob viser deg Pastranabees og Animals Being Human, og du får sjansen til å eksplodere av latter av Butt Bottle Rocket.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Farrah tilkaller politiet etter en heftig krangel med moren. Amber lurer på om hun er gravid, og dermed kan glemme å fullføre skolegangen. Maci saksøker Ryan for å få barnebidrag, og Catelynn må flytte ut av huset til kjæresten Tyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn risikerer å miste kjæresten, mens Ambers kjæreste sier at han kanskje vil forlate henne. Farrah balanserer college, ny jobb, og å bo alene med datteren. Maci innser at hun ikke kan bo sammen med både venner og babyen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Terror
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Gitano
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Phantoms
programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Lover's Knot
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Orpheus
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chloe's Challenge
programme.desc: Gærningene er i Roma og sjefen Anna har jobb til dem - å vise romerne hvordan man fester i Geordie-stil! Nathan er irritert på Chloe, Gaz og Abbie kommer nærmere hverandre og Aaron forteller Gaz at han vil prøve med Marnie, men vil hun det?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Triple Date
programme.desc: Abbie våkner opp og føler at hun har kontrollen over hennes og Gaz' forhold. Mens Nathan og Chloe blir sammen igjen, drar resten av gjengen på laserkrig der Gaz kun konsentrerer seg om Abbie.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Has Gary Met His Match?
programme.desc: Aaron våkner på bursdagen sin med tømmermenn og en sinna Marnie. På Aarons fest har både Gary og Abbie godt blikk for andre gjester og Marnie gir Aaron en gave han ikke vil komme til å glemme så lett.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Couples Counselling
programme.desc: Mens gjengen gjør seg rede til å forlate huset, må Marnie bestemme seg rundt henne og Aarons forhold. Gary og Abbie er glade for sitt åpne forhold, men når Marnie prater med Aaron kan det virke som om Maaron er slutt for godt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Parsnip Party
programme.desc: Geordiene er tilbake, og to nye medlemmer blir med i familien. Steph irriterer Marnie siden hun har noe uoppgjort med sin gamle flamme Aaron. Og Chloe og Abbie konkurrerer om den nye gutten Sams gunst - men hvem vil Sam velge?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Mike klarer ikke å vente lenger med å avsløre 'sannheten' for Snookis kjæreste. Pauly, Vinny og Deena synes det er vanskelig å være de single i huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Meatball Stands Alone
programme.desc: Da Mike forteller Jionni om ham og Snooki, blir det bråk. Deena må takle sannheten om Joey. Noen fra huset drar på camping, mens Vinny og Pauly drar den største spøken i hele Shore-historien!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 502
programme.desc: Her møtes Mike, Snooki, Pauly og Deena og snakker om å komme tilbake til Seaside Heights, og om Vinnys hjemlengsel. Og når gjengen gjennomgår dramatikken mellom Mike og Snooki, heiter det seg til en smule.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 504
programme.desc: Vi møter Mike, Vinny og Deena som snakker om da Vinny kom tilbake til strandhuset, om Mikes forhold til Paula og Paulys forhold til...vel, alle andre. Og vi får en snikkikk på neste episode!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 507
programme.desc: Det er damenes aften og Jenni, Sammi, Snooki og Deena skravler om Jennis kjærlighetstrøbbel med Roger, om kjøttbollegreier og Guidette-problemer. Og vi får en snikkikk på hva vi har i vente.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gym, Tan, Look Back
programme.desc: Jerseygjengen tar et tilbakeblikk på sin reise sammen de siste tre årene. Amerikas yndlingssamboere forteller i intervjuer sine unike historier om uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Og en sniktitt på sesong 6 er med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Once More Unto the Beach
programme.desc: Alle kommer til strandhuset en siste gang. The Situation forteller ærlig om rehabiliteringen og Snooki må møte den utfordringen det er å være gravid i et hus skapt for festing og moro.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Shades of Grey
programme.desc: Mouse makes his first appearance - and is quickly shunned by the Family of tunnel folk for thievery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: China Moon
programme.desc: Vincent and Catherine help a Chinatown beauty avoid an arranged marriage by escaping into the underground.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Alchemist
programme.desc: Catherine has reason to believe that a new drug on the streets is being supplied by someone from Vincent's world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful attorney seduces Catherine's boss, Joe Maxwell, creating a serious conflict of interest.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Promises of Someday
programme.desc: Catherine is disturbed when she begins to suspect the new attorney in her office is a fraud... and more disturbed when she finds him looking for the entrance to Vincent's world.

programme.title: JAG: The Colonel's Wife
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Panama to investigate the possibility that the wife of the Marine officer in charge of interdicting drugs from Columbia was smuggling drugs into the US.

programme.title: JAG: Mishap
programme.desc: "Skates", Harm's RIO when he was aboard the USS Patrick Henry, was the Landing Safety Officer in charge of the deck when a Tomcat crashes while making an emergency landing.

programme.title: JAG: Into the Breach
programme.desc: Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG: Boomerang (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hostilities between Harm and Brumby escalate both in and out of the courtroom and it takes Chegwidden, with Brumby's CO's approval to get them to deal with their anger

programme.title: JAG: People V. Gunny
programme.desc: Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Taking Sides / Going By The Book / A Friendly Little Game
programme.desc: An older couple's problems affect the marriage of newlyweds.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Parents Know Best / A Selfless Love / The Nubile Nurse
programme.desc: A couple takes their son on a cruise in an attempt to end his relationship with an unsuitable girl; a May-December couple rethinks their romance; an ex-showgirl's glamorous past jeopardizes her new career as a registered nurse. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Musical Cabins
programme.desc: A young bachelor must marry within the week in order to claim a $3 million inheritance; a drab widow poses as a glamorous adventuress and captures the heart of the Captain.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Crash Diet Crush / This Business Of Love / I'll Never Fall In Love Again
programme.desc: A reformed prostitute causes trouble between a one-time "John" and his wife; Captain Stubing re-encounters an old flame; a fun-loving older couple help bring two lovers back together. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Pacific Princess Overtures / Cabin Fever / Gopher, The Rebel
programme.desc: A young female passenger encourages Gopher to be his own person and stand up for himself to Captain Stubing. However, neither were expecting the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: MacGyver: Eye of Osiris
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to Turkey in search of Alexander the Great's tomb and the legendary Eye of Osiris.

programme.title: MacGyver: High Control
programme.desc: MacGyver infiltrates a criminal biker gang to help prove a parolee's innocence.

programme.title: MacGyver: There But For The Grace
programme.desc: MacGyver goes undercover as a homeless person to investigate the murder of a priest.

programme.title: MacGyver: Bind Faith
programme.desc: Pete Thornton agrees to take on the security of an old friend, political refugee Samantha Lora, but finds he can't do the job alone because of a worsening vision problem. He enlists MacGyver's help.

programme.title: MacGyver: Faith, Hope & Charity
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a mobster's search for stolen loot while nursing his injured leg at a country bed and breakfast run by two elderly sisters.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 1)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock accepts the most dangerous case of his career when he agrees to defend an inmate accused of murder – before a kangaroo court in a riot-torn prison.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock must protect his own life while he’s in prison trying to defend his client. Meanwhile, Conrad tries to unravel the prison murder plot from outside the walls.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is left with a lot of questions and no answers when his client, Drew Carey, bolts from the courtroom during a preliminary hearing for murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Buddies
programme.desc: A deathbed letter from an old friend puts the life of Ben Matlock in peril when he feels morally obligated to reopen a murder case more than three decades old.

programme.title: Matlock: The Scrooge
programme.desc: The senseless murder of a toy store owner not only clouds the Christmas spirit, but threatens an annual party and gifts of toys to local orphans.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dying of gunshot wounds, private investigator Charlie Harper whispers one final cryptic message to Dr. Sloan. Intrigued, Sloan searches for the meaning of the dying man's last words with the aid of Charlie's secretary, Georgia.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's sister Dora is moving to town. She needs a place to stay overnight while her new home is fumigated; however, they soon discover that more than just bugs have been exterminated.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og spesialgjest Lolo Wood at selv dommere kan oppleve stygge 'Dommertreff', at de kan bli fiskemat under 'Vannattakk og de hopper over instruksjoner i 'Anvisningskaos'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Verden snur seg rundt henne
programme.desc: En gisselsituasjon oppstår når mannskapet konfronterer Tyr.

programme.title: Andromeda: Kanal til skjebne
programme.desc: En feil sving i glidestrømmen fører Andromeda til et fengselsopprør.

programme.title: Andromeda: Machines of the Mind
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Opphøyet grunn, strålende datter
programme.desc: Andromeda-mannskapet går opp for å finne ut hvem som drepte en gruppe forskere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Torment, the Release
programme.desc: Samlerne kontrollerer nå Commonwealth og setter Andromeda-mannskapet for retten.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body. Police were sure that if they found the man who fit the shoes, they would also find the man who committed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: A serial killer was on the loose and police had to find him before he struck again. Their most promising lead was an unusual one: a bloody fingerprint on the body of one of the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Tara! Tara! Tara!, Hairy Escape, Spooks, Over the Edge and Black and Blue.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Chameleon, Crime Novelist, Lourdes and Death Row Defender.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina
programme.desc: This episode includes: Musician Sings the Blues, Killer Casanova, Update: Victorio's Gold, Rudolph on the Run and Dress-Up Escape.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Rookie Death, Roswell, Missing Angel, ATV Murders and Murderer's Escape.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Killer Castro, Terri's Killer, Mississippi Hangings, Woody's Millions and Southern Disappearance.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hired Gun
programme.desc: When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Moving Target
programme.desc: When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out Of The Grave
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives: From The Ashes
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Undaunted
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever undaunted.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: As the team delves deeper into the Valley Mills, subtle sounds begin to stir the silence—unheard by the cameras, but felt by those present. A chilling metallic swing echoes through the empty building with no visible source.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling third part of our Greenfield Valley investigation, we continue deep within the historic mills—where echoes of the past seem to come alive. With intense K2 meter spikes, disembodied footsteps and unexplained sounds.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the historic heart of Greenfield Valley Mills, Sean and Bex uncover chilling echoes of its industrial past. Once alive with the hum of machinery and the toil of mill workers, the site now stands in eerie silence.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this chilling investigation, the Ghost Dimension team travel deep into Greenfield Valley to uncover the haunted secrets of Basingwerk Abbey. Once home to Cistercian monks and steeped in centuries of devotion and conflict.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special
programme.desc: Join Bex, Sean and the team as they investigate The Wellington Hotel for Halloween. Based in Halewood, this public inn has more haunting inside of its walls than the spirits behind the bar

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Said She'd Drown the Baby
programme.desc: Devon slipped into a coma and is on life support. But before he fell into a coma, he told his mother that his ex Alisha said he did not father their son. Alisha denies ever saying this and feels his whole family has turned their backs on her.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheaters Come Clean
programme.desc: Couples reveal they have been cheating on today's Jerry Springer Show. Candice confronts Nikki for sleeping with her man and Mike suspects Moon has been cheating with two people.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Holiday Hell Feast
programme.desc: Melody is horrified that her sister, Amanda, is ruining her life by dating a 54 year old biker and loser named Wolf. Today they'll face off against Amanda's entire family!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Homewreckers Confronted
programme.desc: Linda says her former best friend is trying to steal her man and she's fighting back! Then, Sherry wants her boyfriend Terry's wife Sandy and her family out of their lives!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Wives Battle Mistresses
programme.desc: Today, Vicki will face her husband Jason and his lover with an ultimatum and Anna admits she’s trying to steal Misty’s husband – again!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: We Live In A Car
programme.desc: Our guests say they're ready to come clean. Yolando regrets sleeping with her best friend’s boyfriend and Cameron has been hiding a secret from his roommates.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: High Class Call Girls
programme.desc: Bambi gives us a rare, honest look into her ultra-exclusive lifestyle in LA. Tiffany confronts C.T. over a rotten business deal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: No Good Deed
programme.desc: After a man is brutally gunned down in the middle of the street, Kenda must piece together a complicated puzzle of conflicting stories and dead ends.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Preying on the Innocent
programme.desc: When the son of a prominent politician is murdered in his basement, Lt. Joe Kenda feels pressure from City Hall to solve the case.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Case That Haunts Me
programme.desc: As Det. Joe Kenda digs into another murder, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Cops: Rocks in my Socks
programme.desc: Deputies discover a purse and a sock containing paraphernalia during an arrest. Deputies pursue an intoxicated motorcyclist. A woman is suspected of stealing a cake.

programme.title: Cops: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Deputies prevent the delivery of a pillow stuffed with drugs. A disabled woman calls the law when a father and son get into a fist fight. Deputies confront an intoxicated man riding a bike.

programme.title: Cops: Memory Loss
programme.desc: A man on parole dumps a stolen car and flees from officers on foot. A man denies stealing a wallet from a car with a smashed window. A hostile woman gives officers a false name.

programme.title: Cops: Up for Sainthood
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: Cops: Beer Run
programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops: Petrol Heist
programme.desc: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.

programme.title: Unsolved Murders
programme.desc: On June 1, 2011, firefighters intervened to put out a fire in a joke shop in Louvroil in the North. They discovered the charred body of Jean Moritz at the back of the premises.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Nursery and The Closet
programme.desc: A dangerous entity stalks a pregnant woman in her new house. A single mother discovers a terrifying secret trapped in her son's closet. The shocking eyewitness accounts of terrified people whose dream homes have become nightmares.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Unwanted Guest and Mirror Image
programme.desc: A dangerous poltergeist threatens a newly-blended family. A young woman is tormented by visions of her own gruesome death.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Trapped and Retreat
programme.desc: Paranormal activity threatens a young nurse caring for a catatonic patient. A young couple falls prey to a demonic presence in a remote cabin.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Evil Down Below
programme.desc: A scientist discovers footage on his security camera that even he can't explain; and a sailing ship from the 1800's is home to a ghostly crew.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Incubus
programme.desc: Spirits from an abandoned slaughterhouse invade a couple's home. People at a health club work out under the watchful eyes of a cigarette-smoking ghost; and an Ohio woman is violated by a paranormal incubus in her own bedroom.

programme.title: Andromeda: Inn i labyrinten
programme.desc: En avgrunnsagent prøver å lokke Harper til å bli med i Magog

programme.title: Andromeda: Prinsen
programme.desc: Når de redder en ung prins fra et opprør som dreper resten av familien hans, blir Dylan og Tyr bedt om å være hans rådgivere.

programme.title: Mutant X: Crossroads of the Soul
programme.desc: Teamet tar sikte på å redde Brennan, som har blitt fanget inne i en usynlig by og står overfor henrettelse for en forbrytelse han ikke begikk.

programme.title: Mutant X: Sign from Above
programme.desc: Tre utenomjordiske personer som utgjør en alvorlig trussel mot menneskeheten, retter seg mot Shalimar, så teamet satser på å redde henne fra sine onde klør.

programme.title: Mutant X: Body and Soul
programme.desc: En kroppsløs mutant overtar likene til forskjellige mennesker og setter seg for å gå etter de som gjorde dette mot ham. En av dem er en lege som Shalimar liker.

programme.title: Mutant X: Understudy
programme.desc: Mens han er på jobb, blir Shalimar skadet og blir hjulpet av en annen vill mutant, Nikki, som hun kjente og nesten ble valgt for laget. Mens Shalimar blir frisk, tilbyr hun å fylle ut.

programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: On the Case: Tracks of a Killer
programme.desc: Police retrace a young woman's final movements with hope that it will lead them straight to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Fatal Footage
programme.desc: An innocent mother of two is mysteriously shot in downtown Philadelphia. Surveillance cameras record every detail but can't unmask the killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Blood, Sweat and Tears

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder in Pelham
programme.desc: A daughter spends 25 years pursuing the truth behind her mother's mysterious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Tears

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Buffalo Scores
programme.desc: Buffalo scores the charter of a lifetime when they're asked to transport the Stanley Cup on a tour of the North. Cup fever spreads quickly around Buffalo, and for Mikey, what begins as an innocent love for this hockey icon soon becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Chief Pilot Arnie lands the DC-3 on a homemade sand strip at a remote lodge. Electra expert Chuck goes one-on-one with a stubborn power unit, and Rod's wife Sasha goes into labour with the newest member of the McBryan family.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Yukon
programme.desc: When thunderstorms and a shaking engine threaten a DC-3 charter to Whitehorse, Joe pulls out all the stops to get the passengers to their destination.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: British Invasion
programme.desc: oe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Under New Management
programme.desc: Joe hires outsider Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey. Gord and Sean's DC-3 delivery mission to the High Arctic goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tig Notaro, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's Birthday Surprise Show with Penn Badgley& John Oliver
programme.desc: It's Drew's birthday and we're celebrating all show long with some special surprises for her! "You" star Penn Badgley is surprising Drew with a special birthday present and telling her all about the new season of his hit show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Danny Seo, Mikel Welch, Drew's News with Rachel Dratch
programme.desc: The celebration continues, and Drew's birthday twin Rachel Dratch has a delicious surprise for her when she joinsDrew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: William Jackson Harper, Drew's News, Andrew Rea
programme.desc: "Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania" star William Jackson Harper is telling Drew about his role in the new Marvel film, why he took his dog to a pet psychic and how he met his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bronwyn Tarboton, Drew's News
programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Guy Fieri, Damona Hoffman, Pilar Valdes, Robin Black
programme.desc: "Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives" host Guy Fieri is joining Drew to chat and play a game! Dating expert Damona Hoffman is joining Drew, Ross Mathews and his husband Wellington Garciato talk about love and soulmates.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Taye Diggs, Jamila Norman, Jeralyn Gerba, Nadine Jane
programme.desc: "All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Senator Bernie Sanders, Drew's News
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jabari Banks, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Bel-Air" star Jabari Banks is joining Drew to chat about his show. Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Gayle King, Drew & Ross Visit Montana
programme.desc: "CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines, covering topics like the woman who found an unusual way to calm her nerves before a first kiss.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Gayle King, Brittany O'Grady and Nat Wolf
programme.desc: "CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines. Plus, its Drew' News: The Weekender Edition, a curated list of must-haves, must watches and more to do this weekend from Drew!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Whitney Cummings, Anita Tam, Drew's News with Whitney Cummings
programme.desc: "At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ransom

programme.title: Cops: Allergy Season
programme.desc: A drunk driver rams into a pursuing police car. A man on a bike flees an area known for drug activity on a bike. A sniffling man attempts to hide a baggie with narcotics under his shirt.

programme.title: Cops: Yard Work
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over an wrinkly infant's shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.

programme.title: Cops: Keep it Down!
programme.desc: An officer is forced to subdue a suspect with his baton. A man asks deputies to give him back his drugs before taking him to jail. A man causes a disturbance at an apartment complex.

programme.title: Cops: Hot Potato
programme.desc: A man tosses his stash after being pulled over. Officers question two men in a fight who live with the same woman. A man says his shorts are from a thrift store after drugs are found in them.

programme.title: Cops: Nerves of Noodles
programme.desc: A man tells deputies the pants he has on aren't his. Officers are called to the scene of men firing an ak-47. A nervous driver fesses up to the deputy who stopped him.

programme.title: Cops: What's Your Deductible?
programme.desc: Detectives chase a suspect who wrecks his car. Police are called when a man headbutts his neighbor. Officers tend to a woman punched in the face by her husband while on the bus.

programme.title: Cops: Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: A suspect flees police in a truck over a misdemeanor traffic warrant. A man denies hitting his wife who has a bloody nose. A man denies ownership of his shorts when deputies find drugs in them.

programme.title: Cops: High Speed Golf
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a truck with a trailer full of golf carts. Police question a driver after finding a mask and handgun in his car. Officers are called to a traffic collision involving a semi and an SUV.

programme.title: Cops: Bumper Cars
programme.desc: A man rams his wife's car into his daughter's car. Deputies find a rifle in a suspect's car that was in a prior altercation. A man claims to run a travel business after cops find evidence of id theft.

programme.title: Cops: Doggie Dispute
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man wanted in connection with a family violence call. Detectives are called to a dispute between neighbors over an unleashed dog.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains. Taken to hospital, the couple die several days apart. The food poisoning theory is quickly ruled out and forensic tests show the Labrells were poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Nelly Crémel Case
programme.desc: Nelly Crémel, 39, leaves her home to go jogging. Eight days later, after a vast search campaign, her body is found. There's no doubt that it's murder. The case soon ignites public opinion, even inflaming passions at the highest level of the state.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Drost Notthoff Case
programme.desc: On September 11th 2011, in Èze, near Monaco, the owner of a luxury villa discovers the lifeless hanging body of his tenant, a rich German businessman.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Françoise Desnoue Case
programme.desc: On the evening of August 30st 2013, in a small village of Bougrogne, Éric Desnoue, 52 years old, reports his wife missing to the police. Did Françoise Desnoue run away? Or did she reattempt to kill herself?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 401
programme.desc: I mai 1995 blir 17 år gamle Birgitte Tengs funnet drept bare noen få hundre meter unna sitt hjem i Kopervik på Karmøy. Saken fører til omfattende etterforskning, og Birgittes fetter havner raskt i søkelyset.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 703
programme.desc: 18 år gamle Ndella Jack har nettopp kommet hjem fra bryllupsreise med mannen sin. Det som skulle være starten på deres liv sammen, får i stedet en brå slutt, da de blir ofre for et brutalt angrep.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 606
programme.desc: Den siste gangen Fatima Berggren ble sett i live var på hennes 57-årsdag i mai 2017. Saken blir først betraktet som en kidnapping, men uten livstegn fra Fatima, anser politiet det snart som en drapssak.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 602
programme.desc: En regnfull morgen den 19. oktober 2004 dreper en ukjent mann en åtte år gammel gutt og en 56 år gammel kvinne i Linköping. Gjerningsmannen forsvinner sporløst og politiet må nå finne ut hvem han er.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Wunderkind
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck campaign manager (John Cho) is determined to get a kid (Jacob Tremblay) elected as the President of the United States. Allison Tolman and John Larroquette guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Six Degrees of Freedom
programme.desc: A space crew preparing for the first human flight to Mars is faced with a life-altering decision...and its consequences. DeWanda Wise, Jessica Williams, Jefferson White, Lucinda Dryzek and Jonathan Whitesell guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Dummy
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Young Man's Fancy
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Sing the Body Electric
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Not All Men
programme.desc: A meteor shower spreads infection across an entire town... affecting some of the inhabitants more than others. Taissa Farmiga, Rhea Seehorn, Luke Kirby and Ike Barinholtz guest star.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Pusha T battles the wings of death, discusses the art of rap beef and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Adam Carolla Rants Like a Pro While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Adam Carolla is a radio legend, TV host, filmmaker and best-selling author.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Michael Cera Experiences Mouth Pains While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Michael Cera is best known for his award-winning roles in films like "Juno" and "Scott Pilgrim vs. the World."

programme.title: Hot Ones: Logic Solves a Rubik's Cube While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Rap phenom Logic spreads peace, love and positivity wherever he goes. But how is he with hot food?

programme.title: Hot Ones: Paris Hilton Says "That's Hot" While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Paris Hilton is an entrepreneur, DJ, philanthropist and business mogul.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Shakira discusses the evolution of her singing voice and collaborating with Seth MacFarlane.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Quinta discusses the ins and outs of making a successful comedy sitcom and her SNL hosting experience.

programme.title: Hot Ones: John Mayer Has a Sing-Off While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: John Mayer is a platinum-selling singer-songwriter with seven Grammys and the ability to shred the guitar.

programme.title: Hot Ones: E-40 Asks a Fan to Save Him While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: E-40 is a hip-hop legend with more than three decades in the game — and he is ready to take on the heat.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jeffrey Dean Morgan Can't Feel His Face While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dean Morgan has played many iconic roles on film and TV, most notably as Negan on "The Walking Dead."

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: DVD, CD, PDA, HDTV, PVR--used to be the ultimate in "gotta have it" gadgets and gizmos and "to die for" technology that populate a digital world of acronyms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Thousands of tons of dirt transform a stadium into a Supercross course in Las Vegas; special mud helps pros grip baseballs; mud wrestling in Hawaii; adobe and rammed-earth homes; potting soil facility in California.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The historic one-armed bandits; cutting edge, computerized slot machines; some of the wackiest vending machines; binoculars at popular tourist sites; a unique company that collects and cleans the coins thrown into fountains.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: They're the meat in our sandwiches and slices of American pop culture; take a look behind the deli counter to reveal the secret ingredients in boloney; watch a master sausage maker craft salami, and pile it on at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Copper transports electricity, water, and heat while being essential for survival yet killing microbes; this versatile metal conducts electricity globally, revolutionizes electronics, forms plumbing pipes, creates beautiful roofs, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Cotton caused a civil war and jump-started the Industrial Revolution while becoming the world's most ubiquitous fabric; a chronicle of cotton's journey from dirt to shirt.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The IRA Conspiracy
programme.desc: During WWII, the IRA's "S Plan" aimed to bomb Britain, drawing German support to weaken the British. "Operation Green" and "Plan Kathleen" envisioned IRA aiding a German invasion of Northern Ireland, but both failed due to bungling and infighting.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Good Collaborators?
programme.desc: Finland defended itself in the Winter War under Marshal Mannerheim. Finland allied with Nazi Germany against the Soviet Union in 1941. Finland later negotiated peace with the Allies and switched sides as Nazi defeat became apparent.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Croatian Collaborator
programme.desc: Croatia grapples with its fascist past through figures like Dinko Sakic, once hailed as a hero but later convicted of war crimes. Leading the notorious Jasenovac camp, Sakic oversaw brutal atrocities against inmates.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Preparing for War
programme.desc: Hitler unveils his military plans: annex Austria, seize the Sudetenland, and eventually invade Poland and the Soviet Union. By March 1938, Austria falls bloodlessly. By September 1939, he invades Poland, sparking World War Two.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Artillery, "The King of Battle," has shaped history from ancient cannons to today's M777 Howitzer. Host Wil Willis visits Fort Sill, Oklahoma, to witness modern artillery like the M777 and M109 Paladin in action.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Hubert Lewbert
programme.desc: En "Lur Lewbert"-sketsj går helt galt og skader Carlys irriterende portvakt. Gjengen pleier ham inntil Freddies mor tar over. Men når kærligheten begynner å blomstre, må de sette en stopper for det.

programme.title: iCarly: Pie
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Spencer tar med Freddie til deres yndlingskonditori, finner de ut at eieren er død. Men enda verre er det at oppskriftene hans kanskje er gått tapt for alltid.

programme.title: iCarly: Jul
programme.desc: I et forsøk på å pifte opp julen med et utradisjonelt tre, kommer Spencer til å sette fyr på alle Carlys gaver. Fortvilet ønsker hun seg at hun hadde en normal bror.

programme.title: iCarly: Kysset
programme.desc: Sam overhører Freddie fortelle Carly at han aldri har kysset en jente, og avslører hemmeligheten hans på netshowet. Gibby og Carly trener Spencer til utttaket for det lokale, profesjonelle fotballaget.

programme.title: iCarly: Bilbråk
programme.desc: Gjengen holder en konkurranse på iCarly, og premien er en ny bil fra en lokal forhandler. Etter at Nevel vinner, oppdager barna at forhandleren ikke visste noe om konkurransen eller bilen de skulle ha donert bort som premie.

programme.title: iCarly: Fred
programme.desc: Freddie sier offentlig at han ikke er fan av internettsensasjonen Fred, noe som får Fred til å meddele at han skal slutte å legge ut filmer for alltid. Fansen blir rasende fordi Freddie har forårsaket slutten på de populære filmene.

programme.title: iCarly: Dobbelt opp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie sniker seg ut for å dra til en MMA-kamp, får de sine dobbeltgjengere til å lure Spencer til å tro at de fortsatt er hjemme. Imens bygger Spencer en kjempeversjon av Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly: Om hva for noe?
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie oppfordrer iCarly-fans til å stemme på David Archuleta i "Amerika Sings", syns de synd på nummer to og hjelper ham med å lage en musikkvideo.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg skal gjøre Sam jentete
programme.desc: Da Sam innrømmer at hun liker en gutt på skolen, lærer Carly henne hvordan hun kan lokke ham til seg ved å oppføre seg mere feminint. Spencer er overbevist om at en jente liker ham pga. smokingen hans, så han går med den hele tiden.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2

programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Claus

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Little Big Kraft
programme.desc: Tired of Mr. Kraft’s harsh rules, Sabrina concocts a potion to make him act like a teenager.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: 5 Easy Pieces Of Libby
programme.desc: Libby is even harder to figure out after Sabrina accidentally turns her into a jigsaw puzzle.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Finger Lickin’ Flu
programme.desc: Sabrina catches the flu in her pointing finger and accidentally transfers her magic to a teacher.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Equalizer

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Band Show

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: When Teens Collide

programme.title: Fem i familien: Anniversary Waltz

programme.title: Fem i familien: A Keaton Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A cynical Alex finds the spirit of Christmas in a dream.

programme.title: Fem i familien: 'M' Is For the Many Things
programme.desc: Elyse is shocked by her soon-to-be-divorced mother's quick and free-spirited plunge into the singles world.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Say Uncle
programme.desc: Alex discovers that his idol, young Uncle Ned, has a serious drinking problem.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Ladies Man
programme.desc: Alex pretends to support the Equal Rights Amendment to impress a pretty feminist.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Mallory turns to Alex for some advice when she begins to fear she'll lose her new boyfriend unless she agrees to his pleas for a more "adult" romance.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lady Sings the Blues
programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East Bowl Rap / West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer All-Stars fra East/West bowl som rapper, karene spiller mafioso og de to parkeringstypene har vanskelig for å tro at noen tør å provosere Batmans.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Flicker
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan har en flickerkamp og en MMA-fighter går for langt når han erter motstanderen. Andre sketsjer inkluderer en bryllupsgjest somvil være dj og spille "klassiske" låter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrible Henchman
programme.desc: En nødsituasjon tvinger en mann til å endre morgenritualet sitt, en medforbryter ødelegger for superskurken og Jordan minner Keegan på at han er voksen nå.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dubstep
programme.desc: President Obama og hans vredeoversetter, Luther, taler til Mitt Romney, vi møter mannen som skulle holde tale etter Martin Luther Kings 'I Have A Dream'-tale, og to venner prater om hva som skjer med bæsjen deres atter at de skyller ned.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bitch
programme.desc: I denne seriepremierer av komiprogrammet prøver Jordan Peele og Keegan Michael Key å si et forbudt ord om deres kvinner, Lil Wayne venner seg til livet bak lås og slå, og president Obama uttrykker hva han egentlig føler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dueling Magical Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan spiller to mystikere som kjemper om rettigheten til å gi skarpsindige råd. Andre sketsjer inkluderer Jaden Smith og hans agent som diskuterer et nytt manuskript, og et homsepar som 'feirer' ny lovgivning.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Severed Head Showcase
programme.desc: En gospel-gruppe må øve uten læreren sin, en gjeng krigere feirer en halshugning, en fange prøver å narre fengselsvakten og en ung mann blir konfrontert fordi han bare snakker i floskler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Old Ladies And Satan
programme.desc: To gamle damer slåss mot Satan, ting går galt når en mann vil kjøpe en ny madrass og gjestene på en klubb tvinges til å se sannheten om seg selv.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama Shutdown
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan blir litt for høy, en forballspiller som vil gjøre alt for å få rødt kort, og to sexeksperter som gir råd om cunnilingus.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Black Ice News
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Samuel og Lashawn som gleder seg over fordelene ved sine nå lovlige ekteskap, en politibetjent som møter sin nye makker og Lando fra 'Star Wars' blir forfulgt av et superfan.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Non-Stop Party
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fyr som jager etter kjæresten sin til verdens ende og LMFAO som ikke kan holde opp med å feste.

programme.title: Broad City: Mushrooms
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana ruser seg på sopp og opplever en hendelsesrik trip.

programme.title: Broad City: Abbi's Mom
programme.desc: Abbis mor kommer til byen på besøk, og Ilana navigerer Sushi Mambeaux' intense arbeidskultur samtidig som hun håndterer sin sesongavhengig depresjon.

programme.title: Broad City: Witches
programme.desc: Abbi føler seg gammel etter å ha funnet et grått hår; Ilana går til en sexterapeut.

programme.title: Broad City: Florida
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Eliot og Bobbi drar til Florida for å rydde ut av Grandma Esthers leilighet.

programme.title: Broad City: House Sitting
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana, Jaime og Lincoln passer huset til Strands. Ilana og Lincoln definerer forholdet deres, og Abbi går på en Bumble-date med en mann fra fortiden hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bed Bugs
programme.desc: En fancy ny veske gir Abbi tillit under arbeidsledigheten. Ilana og Jaimé må ta tak i et uunngåelig New York City-mareritt.

programme.title: Broad City: Friendiversary
programme.desc: Jentenes 'Friendiversary' utvikler seg i en farlig retning når de blir vitne til noe forferdelig.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Dad Returns
programme.desc: While the deputies investigate Reno's Thai sex trade, Wiegel's long-lost father returns to reconnect with his daughter.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Junior Runs for Office
programme.desc: Junior finds a job he really wants: commissioner for animal carcass removal.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Undercover Acting Coach
programme.desc: Sergeant Clift, the LAPD's undercover acting coach, teaches the deputies the subtle art of theater.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Parade
programme.desc: The Carson City Parade Float Contest brings out the deputies' competitive spirit.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Training Day
programme.desc: Jones adjusts to his new partner's unorthodox style, and Wiegel and Williams enjoy some surprisingly delicious racist wines.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Extradition to Thailand!
programme.desc: Junior and Jones reap the benefits that come from extraditing a murderer, and Dangle and Rizzo receive a surprise crash course in surgery.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Digging with the Murderer
programme.desc: Dangle and Williams haggle with a serial killer to get him to reveal where he buried his victims.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Murder Mystery, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Dangle invites the gang to a Reno's Sierra Historical Society dinner -- and a murder.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Murder Mystery, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Who murdered Debbie Dangle, and how does her death tie into the deputies' sordid past?

programme.title: RENO 911!: We Don't Want the Pope
programme.desc: The deputies provide the pope's advance scouting team with an extensive tour of Reno's seedy side.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ostomy Bag Girl
programme.desc: Daniel finner opp et spill som får Hasbros Parker Brothers til å skjelve av frykt, viser et julekort som er garantert ødelegger julen, og USAs favoritt-analjente får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Weirdoes of the Year; Fan Christmas Cards
programme.desc: Daniel viser sine favorittklipp av årets gærninger, og åpner julekort fra fansen.

programme.title: Tosh.0: We Buy Golf
programme.desc: Daniel gjeninnfører 'Sport eller konsekvens', finner ut av mysteriet om hvem hans far er, og viser den mest sexy nettoppreisningen noensinne.

programme.title: Tosh.0: IceJJFish
programme.desc: Daniel går på date, gir bort bilen sin, og sangeren med fløyelsstemmen IceJJFish får sin nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Take No Orders
programme.desc: Daniel prøver å gjøre alle hjem i USA til offentlige toaletter, har en utfordring som sensuren vil hate og fyren som ikke tar ordre fra kvinner får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ben's Video Resume
programme.desc: Daniel gir C-SPAN bedre seertall ved å tale i Kongressen, spiser frokost med en hjemløs fyr og en ung jobbsøker får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Boomer the Dog
programme.desc: Daniel ansetter nettets mest krenkende advokat, spiller en støtende versjon av Sett halen på eslet og en hund fanget i en manns kropp får oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Model Teacher
programme.desc: Daniel tvinger publikummet til å drikke noe han har laget på toalettet, og selger seg selv for dyre hodetelefoner - og en lærerinne får nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Prancing Elites
programme.desc: Daniel frigjør verden fra homofobi ved hjelp av The Prancing Elites, forvandler forferdelige tweets til en barnebok og berører en heldig fans følelsesmessig.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Comedian Daniel Songer
programme.desc: Daniel viser hvorfor man aldri skal ta med kjæresten sin til et sportsarrangement, og en ny komiker på 49 år får sin oppreisning.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a life-or-death predicament when Caroline aims to boost the value of his work by convincing an influential art columnist that Richard is a deceased artist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feels that Annie consistently chooses the men in her life over their friendship and challenges Annie to take a girls-only trip, but chaos ensues when they take a trip together and both girls find romance at a local ski resort.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has an extra ticket to Chicago and Reggie decides to go.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: A friend of and an old friend of Beckers is in town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker gets shot and Frances Fisher guest stars as his doctor. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Frances Fisher guest stars again as Dr. Elizabeth Carson and reveals to Becker her attraction to him

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: We find out how Jake becomes blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend, and himself. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts to appreciate life after spending an evening in the morgue identifying one of his patients.

programme.title: Becker
