programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' foretar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood litt amatørmessig jordforflytning med 'Helgedosere', tar med ungene i butikken i 'Shoppingmonstere' og setter nesen sørover og opplever litt 'Landsens vrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' feirer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood noen første smeller som ektepar med 'Første store feilsteg', prøver å kommunisere med berusede ved å 'Snakke fyllisk' og opplever fryktløse folk som er 'Slangesikre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjemmer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Carly Aquilino drinken for Drikketyver', ser nye merkelige antrekk i 'Bærbare rariteter' og får andrehånds skrubbsår av trafikanter som følger regelen 'Se i begge retninger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Torment, the Release
programme.desc: Samlerne kontrollerer nå Commonwealth og setter Andromeda-mannskapet for retten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spider's Stratagem
programme.desc: Andromeda oppdager en forsendelse med biorustning.

programme.title: Andromeda: Varmen fra et usynlig lys
programme.desc: En eksperimentell tilsløringsenhet slipper Dylan inn i et alternativt univers.

programme.title: Andromeda: De andre
programme.desc: Andromeda blir fanget i en krig mellom to skip, og den inkluderer en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt brenner ned til aske
programme.desc: Dylan blir lurt av Rev og kidnappet. Mannskapet finner en uventet alliert i en samler.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der
programme.desc: Abyss har smittet Beka. Mannskapet må finne en måte å redde henne på.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman was brutally murdered in her home and the only witnesses to the crime were the family dogs. An expert in canine behavior was convinced the killer knew both the victim and the animals, and he was determined find out what the dogs had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: This killer probably hoped to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene. But investigators saw through the attempt almost immediately and turned to forensic science to learn what really happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Butt Certain
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of college student Laura Salmon was found on a Middle Tennessee farm, covered with her own denim jeans as well as the jeans of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Killer Castro, Terri's Killer, Mississippi Hangings, Woody's Millions and Southern Disappearance.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: David Lee Kemp, Missing Susan, Nazi War Treasure, Sean Don Con and After Death Visits.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: G.I. Guinea Pig, Bank Tunnel, Murder in the Park, Noreen Renier and Unknown Dad.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Maloney's Mickey, Picture Kristen Gone, Coma Comeback, Update: Foster Son, Police Woman Savior and Mystery Cowboy.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Miami Vice, Zel's Odyssey, Missing Rock Star, Image of Guadalupe, Update: Viet Pilot's Daughter and Drunk Driver.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Russian Roulette, Anthrax, Friendly Ghost, Update: Vanished in the Heartland and Scare Tactics.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Backstage Murder
programme.desc: In the 1980's, two partners created a nightclub that would bring them wealth and international fame. The male strip club phenomenon promised female patrons fun and excitement. But the bright lights hid a dark side.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organizationthe Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Undaunted
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Dosage
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder For Hire
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Halloween Special
programme.desc: Join Bex, Sean and the team as they investigate The Wellington Hotel for Halloween. Based in Halewood, this public inn has more haunting inside of its walls than the spirits behind the bar

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: The Lady in Grey
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate claims of a ghost lady in grey haunting Windleshaw abbey, St Helens, Merseyside. Over 600 years old and with new paranormal encounters reported almost weekly. Bex and Sean attempt to make contact with the infamous lady in grey.

programme.title: Ghost Dimensions Top 10 Scariest Moments
programme.desc: A special look into the top 10 of Ghost Dimension’s scariest moments. Venturing into the UK’s most haunted buildings, we take a look back at the scariest captures.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Scars for Life
programme.desc: Could a tattoo studio be haunted? Has a Ouija board opened a gateway to the spirit dimension? Ghost Dimension spend the night investigating Deviant Ink tattoo studio.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: High Class Call Girls
programme.desc: Bambi gives us a rare, honest look into her ultra-exclusive lifestyle in LA. Tiffany confronts C.T. over a rotten business deal.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Holiday Hell With My Feuding Family
programme.desc: There’s no worse time to be fighting with your family than during the holidays. Our old friends Donna and her cheating husband Richard join us for a holiday feast!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheating Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Chris and Steve confess to cheating on their girlfriends and Michelle wants to tell her boyfriend she has a mistress. The tension is high on today's Jerry Springer Show!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: My Pimp Runs My Family
programme.desc: Tracy and Allen have been living in a car. Her two older sisters are here to convince her to temporarily live with them and go back to school until he can provide for them.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I'm Marrying a Transsexual!
programme.desc: Jerry is 58 years old and has had three big changes. He is currently happily engaged to a woman named Joy and speaks about his past gender confusion.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Have Many Lovers
programme.desc: Today, Rufus comes clean about cheating on Treynae with Cheeta and Rhonda tells her girlfriend Lovette that she's in an affair with another woman! Who will choose whom?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Case That Haunts Me
programme.desc: As Det. Joe Kenda digs into another murder, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith… in a burglar.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Unsolved Murders
programme.desc: On June 1, 2011, firefighters intervened to put out a fire in a joke shop in Louvroil in the North. They discovered the charred body of Jean Moritz at the back of the premises.

programme.title: Unsolved Murders
programme.desc: On August 4, 1997, the body of Christian Jambert, a retired gendarme, was discovered in his house in Auxerre. A 22 long rifle was placed on his legs.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 009
programme.desc: Allen Dorfman controlled the Teamsters' vast pension fund, financing Las Vegas and enriching the mob through illicit loans until a massive FBI operation in 1978 targeted him, leading to his bribery conviction and ultimately his assassination in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 010
programme.desc: Joe Valachi, a Mafia hitman, broke the code of silence, revealing the names of bosses and exposing the Mafia's $40 billion empire, sparking a national reckoning and empowering the FBI to escalate their battle against organized crime.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Incubus
programme.desc: Spirits from an abandoned slaughterhouse invade a couple's home. People at a health club work out under the watchful eyes of a cigarette-smoking ghost; and an Ohio woman is violated by a paranormal incubus in her own bedroom.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: I Died in This House
programme.desc: A medium experiences the torture of a prison snitch killed by other inmates. Two soldiers in Iraq are startled by ghostly encounters in abandoned bunkers; and a police officer witnesses paranormal activity in a deserted spa.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Covert Poisoning of An Ex-Russian Spy / The Odd Death of Charles C. Morgan
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane cover the case of a slain ex-spy and the crimes leading to the death of Charles C. Morgan.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Bizarre Disappearance of Bobby Dunbar
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane take an in-depth look at the insane controversy surrounding the disappearance of Bobby Dunbar.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Treacherous Treasure Hunt of Forrest Fenn
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Shane as they attempt to track down the mysterious hidden treasure of Forest Fenn.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Eerie Case of the Watcher
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane take a look at the case of the Watcher, a mysterious stalker who terrorized his neighborhood.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Unusual Australian Shark Arm Murder
programme.desc: Follow along as hosts Ryan and Shane go down under to examine a shark, a speedboat, and a mysterious severed arm.

programme.title: Mutant X: Understudy
programme.desc: Mens han er på jobb, blir Shalimar skadet og blir hjulpet av en annen vill mutant, Nikki, som hun kjente og nesten ble valgt for laget. Mens Shalimar blir frisk, tilbyr hun å fylle ut.

programme.title: Arctic Apocalypse
programme.desc: A massive influx of glacial melting triggers a new ice age in the Northern Hemisphere, forcing a family to make their away the across ice-covered landscape before they are frozen out for good.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Three Rivers to Cross
programme.desc: Ifølge lokale munker er Famed Jade Empress gjemt i dalen som vil bli oversvømmet når Three Rivers Dam flomportene har sin store åpning.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og milliardærentreprenør Rod Thorson fallskjerm i Myanmar-jungelen for å redde et relikktjaktteam ansatt av Thorson for å finne en eldgammel offerskål.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: Når to studenter på sporet av det haitiske korset i Utu forsvinner i New Orleans, går Sydney og Nigel ned på bukten for å finne dem.

programme.title: CBS News Latest Headlines
programme.desc: The latest headlines and top stories from CBS News.

programme.title: CBS News Latest Headlines
programme.desc: The latest headlines and top stories from CBS News.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A young woman's mysterious murder sends detectives on a heartbreaking search for the truth.

programme.title: On the Case: At Death's Door
programme.desc: After a single mother is viciously attacked and left for dead, she still manages to help police track down her assailant.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder at Loose Chippings
programme.desc: After a wealthy couple is found dead in their stately Virginia home, investigators are taken on a wild journey around the globe before they uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: On the Case: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: When Rhonda Boggs is discovered murdered in her own kitchen, police get an important lead from the only witness to the crime, Rhonda's two year old daughter.

programme.title: On the Case: Footprints and Whispers
programme.desc: A beloved husband and wife are found dead in their own home. Will the killers own words bring him to justice?

programme.title: On the Case: Pattern of Violence
programme.desc: A 22 year old real estate agent is discovered strangled to death inside a model home she was trying to sell.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Under New Management
programme.desc: Joe hires outsider Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey. Gord and Sean's DC-3 delivery mission to the High Arctic goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dambusters
programme.desc: Buffalo gets into the stunt flying business when veteran pilot Arnie flies the DC-4 for the re- enactment scene of a famous WWII bombing raid.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Chuck Walks
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits. Joe clashes with the maintenance department when a series of delays puts the sale of an old Canso waterbomber in jeopardy.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Up, Gear Down
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage in Yellowknife, new manager Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Whitney Cummings, Anita Tam, Drew's News with Whitney Cummings
programme.desc: "At Midnight" star Whitney Cummings is joining Drew to take a bungee fitness class! She's also covering the news with Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk including why women may smell different after leaving a boyfriend's place.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Patricia Field, Pilar Valdes, Drew's News
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Rebel Wilson, Lauren Makk
programme.desc: "The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Eliza VanCort, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bobby Farrelly, Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci, Joshua Felder
programme.desc: "Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Chris Freimuth, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Theresa Caputo
programme.desc: "Long Island Medium" star Theresa Caputo is chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mario Cantone, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the one thing Drake regrets about his rap career and how long experts say it takes to decide if you're attracted to someone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Daisy Jones and the Six Cast, Drew's News
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mikel Welch, Kristina Zias, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the woman who tweeted the unusual snack her fellow plane passenger whipped out and the new device that allows lovers to kiss virtually.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Christine Taylor, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie."

programme.title: Cops: Doggie Dispute
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man wanted in connection with a family violence call. Detectives are called to a dispute between neighbors over an unleashed dog.

programme.title: Cops: Rocks in my Socks
programme.desc: Deputies discover a purse and a sock containing paraphernalia during an arrest. Deputies pursue an intoxicated motorcyclist. A woman is suspected of stealing a cake.

programme.title: Cops: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Deputies prevent the delivery of a pillow stuffed with drugs. A disabled woman calls the law when a father and son get into a fist fight. Deputies confront an intoxicated man riding a bike.

programme.title: Cops: Memory Loss
programme.desc: A man on parole dumps a stolen car and flees from officers on foot. A man denies stealing a wallet from a car with a smashed window. A hostile woman gives officers a false name.

programme.title: Cops: Up for Sainthood
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: Cops: Beer Run
programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops: Petrol Heist
programme.desc: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.

programme.title: Cops: Check Please!
programme.desc: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.

programme.title: Cops: Decorating Tips
programme.desc: Officers pursue an SUV on the freeway. Deputies are called when an agitated man armed with scissors tears up a trailer. A driver tells officers the illegal items found in his car was left by a friend.

programme.title: Cops: Hide and Go Porch
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed "Danger" is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Strange Hanging - Chantal Ternik Case
programme.desc: On April 3th 2003, Chantal Ternik, a 48 year old housewife, is discovered hanged in her house of Sanary-sur-Mer, in Var.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Murder in Le Grand Bornand (Flactif case)
programme.desc: Xavier Flactif, his partner Graziella and their three children suddenly disappear. For several days, mystery reigns.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)
programme.desc: Firefighters in Barbizieux, Charente, are called to a fire in a large house in the village. They arrive to find the lifeless body of the owner, Claude Tavernier, 83, lying in a large pool of blood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 601
programme.desc: Den 14. november 2019 forsvinner sytten år gamle Wilma, og hele Uddevalla blir involvert i forsvinningen. Etter noen dager blir det funnet blod i hennes og kjærestens leilighet, men Wilma er fortsatt savnet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Not All Men
programme.desc: A meteor shower spreads infection across an entire town... affecting some of the inhabitants more than others. Taissa Farmiga, Rhea Seehorn, Luke Kirby and Ike Barinholtz guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Point of Origin
programme.desc: A suburban housewife (Ginnifer Goodwin) wants to go home. But where - and what - is home, really? Zabryna Guevara and James Frain guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Changing of the Guard
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: In Praise Of Pip
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Steel
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Blue Scorpion
programme.desc: The emergence of the elusive Blue Scorpion leads anthropology professor Jeff Storck (Chris O'Dowd) to his most personal research project yet.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Desus and Mero Get Smacked By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Bodega Boys bring their hilarious brand of unrelenting comedy to the wings of death.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Brad Leone Celebrates Thanksgiving With Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones: Vince Staples Delivers Hot Takes While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Vince Staples has been requesting bottles of Hot Ones Fiery Chipotle for months!

programme.title: Hot Ones: DaBaby Crushes Ice Cream While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Cardi discusses the art of a rap intro song, her admiration for Rihanna and her undying love for FDR.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Steph discusses NBA popcorn power rankings and memorable moments with Kobe Bryant.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Cotton caused a civil war and jump-started the Industrial Revolution while becoming the world's most ubiquitous fabric; a chronicle of cotton's journey from dirt to shirt.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Today's cowboys blend Old West traditions with modern technology; examine 19th-century cattle industry boom, Spanish-derived saddles and ropes, barbed wire revolution, and modern computer chips, DNA evidence, and artificial insemination techniques.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Delves into the little-known, hugely important, multi-billion-dollar industry of product testing, where wrinkles get ironed out and goods are stripped of marketing and hype to see if they work; meet product testers who serve as truth squads.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Allies devise scientific and mechanical breakthroughs to thwart Hitler's Atlantic Wall and to make the D-Day invasion successful.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Leonardo da Vinci remains intriguing 500 years after death; beyond great artist, he was remarkable scientist and inventor whose notebooks contained incredible machines from weapons to submarines, robots, and analogue computers with workable plans.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: They block the force of a river, produce enough electricity to power cities, move water over hundreds of miles and irrigate fertile valleys.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Artillery, "The King of Battle," has shaped history from ancient cannons to today's M777 Howitzer. Host Wil Willis visits Fort Sill, Oklahoma, to witness modern artillery like the M777 and M109 Paladin in action.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Weapons That Changed The World examines the RPG-7, renowned for its ability to take on tanks and level buildings. Host Wil Willis traces its evolution from WWII's Bazooka to modern counterparts like the AT-4 and Carl Gustav.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: Japan attacks the USA on 7 Dec 1941. For the next 6 months, they continue to have successful attacks.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: Allies turn the tide in the Atlantic, where initially German U-Boats harass freely convoys to supply Britain. The route to bring American soldiers who will land on D-Day is clear.

programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 1
programme.desc: Når Carly dater er en tøffing, prøver hun å holde forholdet skjult for Spencer. Og Sam betaler Freddie for å lage en hjemmeside der hun kan legge ut alle sine ekle videofavoritter.

programme.title: iCarly: Gjenforening med Missy
programme.desc: Da Carlys gamle venninne Missy flytter tilbake til Seattle, tror Sam at Missy prøver å skifte henne ut som Carlys bestevenninne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg må ha skap 239
programme.desc: Når Sam og Freddie begge to vinner konkurransen for skolens beste skap, slir de nødt til å dele skap. Carly ber Spencer gi henne timer i billedkunst.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarly utdelingen
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie holder en iCarly-galla for de beste bruker-bidragene i iCarly, og hyller pristagerne live på web-showet. Spencer verver europeiske badedraktmodeller for å hjelpe ham å lage premiestatuettene.

programme.title: iCarly: Tvillinger
programme.desc: Freddie prøver å bevise at Melanie, Sams tvillingesøster, er Sam i forkledning. Når Carly underviser Spencers nemesis, Chuck, prøver Spencer å overbevise henne om at Chuck er ond.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 2
programme.desc: Når Carly oppdager at hennes tøffe kjæreste Griffin samler på små Pee Wee Babies, må hun ta stilling til om hun holder ut å date en kar som har en kosedyrsamling. I mens forsøker Spencer å hjelpe Sam med å bli kvitt et mareritt.

programme.title: iCarly: iKamp mot Dingo
programme.desc: Dingo-kanalen har stjålet idéer fra iCarly, så Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer drar til Dingos Studio for å fortelle manusforfatterne hva de mener om det.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg tror de kysset
programme.desc: Da Sam kommer til å avsløre overfor Carly at hun og Freddie smugkysset, konfronterer Carly dem med hvorfor de ikke fortalte henne om det. Og Spencer underviser fanger i billedkunst i fengselet.

programme.title: iCarly: Kokkekamp
programme.desc: Når Carl, Sam og Freddie vinner over en berømt tv-kokk i en matlagningskonkurranse, vil ikke kokken lage mat mer og nekter å komme ut av soverommet sitt. Spencer prøver å oppfylle en fremtidsdrøm.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Disney World
programme.desc: A school trip to Disneyworld becomes yet another test for Sabrina on the road to her witch's license

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Quiz Show
programme.desc: Sabrina realizes the importance of her Quizmaster after she inadvertently gets him fired.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Choice
programme.desc: After her aunts decide to go their separate ways, Sabrina has to choose which of the two should raise her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Rumor Mill
programme.desc: Gossip flies when Sabrina does witch community service in the Other Realm rumor mill.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Mom vs. Magic (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina faces the most difficult decision of her life when she must choose between her mom and her magic

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: It’s a Mad Mad Mad Mad (Season Premiere)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns she has to solve the family secret before she can use her Witches License.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Boy Was My Face Red
programme.desc: An embarrassing moment leaves Sabrina red in the face.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey and Libby are paired together for a school project.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lady Sings the Blues
programme.desc: Elyse is excited at the prospect of reviving her folk-singing career at a local nightclub.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Graduate
programme.desc: Alex is so sure that he will be named valedictorian of his class that he can't cope with the thought of being defeated by a girl-especially his girl.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Double Date
programme.desc: Alex courts disaster when he invites two dates to the senior prom. He devises an elaborate scheme for escorting each of the unknowing girls on a night to remember.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Baby Boy Doe
programme.desc: When Alex's pal Skippy discovers he's adopted, Alex helps him cope with the shocking news.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Gambler
programme.desc: When Elyse has a convention speech in 'fascinating east coast resort' Atlantic City, she didn't plan to waste any time and money gambling.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: The news that their mother is pregnant sends the three Keaton kids into an angry outburst resulting in a family battle.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Fabric Smarts
programme.desc: Mallory's enthusiasm for her part-time job at a boutique causes her grades to slip even lower than usual.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Lost Weekend
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse plan a nostalgic weekend with the kids before the baby arrives, and are crushed to discover that the children are not at all interested in reminiscing about old times-they'd rather be with their friends.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Little Man on Campus
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Non-Stop Party
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fyr som jager etter kjæresten sin til verdens ende og LMFAO som ikke kan holde opp med å feste.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Parole Officer Puppet
programme.desc: En tilsynsverge bruker en dukke til å knytte bånd til en person i hans varetekt, en mann med nakkestøtte prøver å feste villt og en soldat har en følelsesladet gjenforening med familien sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Pussy On The Chainwax
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Keegan som blir distraheret mens han snakker i telefon med kjæresten sin, at Keegan og Jordan har en ondskapsfull sjef og hvordan et nytt uttrykk blir til.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Les Miz
programme.desc: Vi møter vikaren fra bykjernen Mr. Garvey og A-Aron, Jordans kjæreste tar ham i å se på porno og karene har det moro med Les Mis.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The End
programme.desc: Ray Parker Jr. har noen nye låter, en mann kan ikke slutte å si "deez nuts", Keegan må ringe 112 og en ung mann lærer om Negrotown.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass: In Recovery
programme.desc: En baseballspiller slåss med sin avhengighet av rumpeklapsing, en mafioso tar hevn og Steve Urkel driver en mann til vanvidd.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Concussion Quarterback
programme.desc: En fotballspiller med hjerneskade prøver å inspirere laget sitt, en mann anklager sin kone for å være utro med en hund og en restauranteier skremmer bort gjestene sine.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Dommer Jessie har et nytt program, en mann venter på et jobbintervju, to damer sludrer, parkeringsvakter diskuterer Val Kilmer, en pensjonert mann fra hæren hører om et nytt prosjekt og en kvinne introduserer sin forlovede for foreldrene.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gang Stand-Off
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer gangstere som er gale etter 'Twilight,' besøk i en verden der navn er promper, og rasistiske superhelter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: Broad City: Broad City
programme.desc: Jentene tar farvel.

programme.title: Broad City: What A Wonderful World
programme.desc: Ilana får nyss om en hemmelig Lil Wayne-konsert. Sammen med Abbi loffer hun seg frem i New York. Jentene lar ingenting hindre dem i å skrape sammen nok penger til billettene. Selv om det blir skremmende, mister de aldri målet av sikte.

programme.title: Broad City: Stolen Phone
programme.desc: Etter å ha prøvd å finne gutter på Facebook, bestemmer Abbi og Ilana seg for å prøve å finne gutter i 'virkeligheten'.

programme.title: Broad City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Ilana prøver å tjene litt ekstra penger i 'temp game'. Abbi lover naboen sin å vente på pakken hans, men hun går glipp av leveransen og må dra til verdens ende for å få fatt i den.

programme.title: RENO 911!: We Don't Want the Pope
programme.desc: The deputies provide the pope's advance scouting team with an extensive tour of Reno's seedy side.

programme.title: RENO 911!: VHS Transfer Memory Lane
programme.desc: Rizzo and Wiegel pervert-proof the Washoe County Library computers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Helping Mayor Hernandez
programme.desc: When Mayor Hernandez calls for help, the Sheriff's Department leaps into action, even if he just needs to get rid of a violent prostitute in his hotel room.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Getaway Trailer
programme.desc: Wiegel and Rizzo get to know each other better while trapped in a fleeing criminal's mobile home.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Stoner Jesus
programme.desc: A drug-addled touring company of "Jesus Christ Superstar" causes trouble in Reno.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Deputy Dance
programme.desc: Levon French, the king of Reno commercials, helps the deputies make a new recruiting ad.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Viacom Grinch
programme.desc: Declan and Junior crack down on knockoff Nickelodeon toys, ruining kids' parties across Reno.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Midnight Swingers
programme.desc: Jones and Williams penetrate the inner circle of Reno's swingers club.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Secret Santa
programme.desc: What were those strange lights in the desert? Who are these new Reno Sheriff's Department deputies?

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Couple's Therapy
programme.desc: Wiegel and Williams work on their communication at couples therapy when Wiegel's insurance dries up.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School & Wrap It Up Box
programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Zapped & It's a Wonderful Chest
programme.desc: Dave screens his failed reality TV show and shares outtakes from "Roots."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Reparations & NY Boobs
programme.desc: Great New York boobs get awards, and Dave predicts reparations chaos.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Great Moments in Hookup History & Ask a Black Dude
programme.desc: With time running out, Martin Johnson has one last stab at glory: Ashley "Smashly" Evans.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Comedian Daniel Songer
programme.desc: Daniel viser hvorfor man aldri skal ta med kjæresten sin til et sportsarrangement, og en ny komiker på 49 år får sin oppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Misses Every Layup
programme.desc: Daniel ser hvor mye sitrus menneskeøyet kan tåle og lærer en mann å spille basket.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Roof Jump
programme.desc: Daniel viser hvordan man hever nivået med hashtagger og snakker med den lykkeligste og ekleste fyren i LA - og piken som vil at Internett skal betale for hennes skader, får nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Spoken Word Fail
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en religiøs rapper med å gjeninnta sin plass på tronen, viser oss at det ikke finnes noen dumme spørsmål (bare dumme jenter) og prøver litt 'ganj'.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Banned from Walmart
programme.desc: Daniel kaster hestesko etter kvinner og lekker ut sine private samtaler til pressen. Desuten får USAs gjerrigste mann nettgenopprettelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Nana Nana Subaru Winner
programme.desc: Daniel avslører hvem som får hans gamle Subaru og viser oss hvorfor det aldri er trygt å besvime hjemme hos ham.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Space Shuttle Launch
programme.desc: Daniel begraver "spadejenta" for alltid, deler ut av fansens "Twisdomsord" til studentene fra 2014, og romfergefyren for nettgjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Perfect Game Bowler
programme.desc: Daniel webchatter med en geit - og en bowler som gikk glipp av sjansen til å få høyeste pong får nettgjenopprettelse.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Summertime Is Great
programme.desc: Daniel feirer slutten på sommeren med å gi en pinlig familie gjenoppreisning, jager folk som har stukket av, og viser oss sitt mest erotiske antrekk hittil.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 617
programme.desc: Daniel møter den eneste mannen i verden som liker damesport, går på lag med en opprydder på kontoret og feirer tilbakekomsten av "Er det rasistisk?"

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: It’s a game of messy politics when Caroline will not endorse a local councilman, who is inspired by her comic strip, while Del conjures up a promotional campaign.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker deals with chaos at work while Reggie studies for a test and Margaret attends the reading of a will. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker starts a secretive new health regime to lower his cholesterol, which leads people to talk about his unknown condition. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is arrested for being confrontational and forced to do community service and Bob moves in with Linda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker feels old after having to renew his driver's license.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker takes a stab at being social by having a dinner party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker fights over a phone bill, Reggie is angry over not being invited to a wedding and Bob gains too much confidence listening to self-help tapes. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker mistakenly tells the wrong family that their father has died, while Margaret and Linda deal with Linda's depressed friend Lynda. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and Linda have jury duty and Jake gets a seeing-eye-dog. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake goes on a date with a blind girl and Margaret is confronted by the fact that one of her patients doesn't like her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets into a passionate discussion about faith in the power of God versus medicine with a Priest and Jake, Reggie and Bob take a stab at the stock market.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Spillet er i gang! Gjesten på solo er gjenstand for spekulasjon og parene skal gjennom en tillitseremoni. Stoler de på hverandre, eller er det noen som blir fristet til å bytte partner?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Parenes troskap settes på prøve idet en ny deltager sjekker inn. På Solo kommer det inn et brev med et hemmelig oppdrag som snur opp-ned på hele hotellet.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Det er klart for sesongens første parseremoni. Spillet er i gang for fullt og slue planer legges. En mystisk gjest sjekker inn på Perla.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Mayoo har inntatt rollen som rektor mens inspektøren følger nøye med i det parene må opp til eksamen. Hvilken jente blir satt i fare som følge av manglende kunnskap?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: En upopulær handling under eksamen skaper splid i den ene alliansen. De «dummeste» på hotellet skal på date med den nye jenta, som må ta et vanskelig valg.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Skolen er ikke for alle og eksamensstresset fører til eksplosiv stemning på festen. Pass på hva du sier bak andres rygg, for du vet aldri hvem som sitter på makten på Paradise Hotel.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 904
programme.desc: Positivitetsblogger Petter ønsker å bo nærmere sentrum, men klarer Karianne å finne den perfekte guttebula? Camilla og Jon Erik trenger mer plass og får hjelp av Hans Christian.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 905
programme.desc: Iselinn og Ron er helt uenige om hvor de vil bo. Klarer Karianne å løse en tilnærmet umulig oppgave? Gårdsguttene Kim og Ole Johnny er på jakt etter et idyllisk gårdsbruk med skog og egen strandlinje.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 906
programme.desc: Karianne får et viktig oppdrag med å hjelpe alenemamma Samia i hus før mammapermisjonen er over – men holder budsjettet? Hans Christian møter Johanna og Joakim som er på jakt etter drømmehagen.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1001
programme.desc: Ingrid bor på leilighetshotell med sine to barn, og er desperat etter å få en ny start, og skape et hjem sammen med familien. Småbarnsforeldrene Toril og Eivind vil ut av leiligheten sin i Oslo-gryta.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1002
programme.desc: Lise og Damien blir snart tobarnsforeldre og vil ut av bykjernen og ned på bakkeplan. Cecilia starter i ny jobb i Trondheim om to uker, men har ikke hatt tid til å gå på visninger.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1003
programme.desc: Ole Jørgen og Gina er førstegangskjøpere på begrenset budsjett, og drømmer om en fredfull og landlig enebolig til seg og kattene. Oda og Simon har noen spesielle utfordringer med sin nåværende bolig.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 524
programme.desc: Det er konkurransedag på Camp Kulinaris. Det oppstår uenigheter i leiren når deltakerne diskuterer uka som gikk.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 423
programme.desc: Det er serveringsdag på Camp Kulinaris. Benedicte er overlatt til seg selv, Fetisha er fortsatt bekymret for Hasse manglende fokus, Mia er sliten og Terje får merke hennes synkende humør.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 215
programme.desc: Det blir en dramatisk start på dagen for deltakerne, og det ser dårlig ut for 100-kilos grisen bare timer før ukens servering.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 723
programme.desc: 8 retter står på dagens a la carte-meny. Klarer restaurantsjefen å lede gjengen gjennom dagens krevende servering? Og hva slags ekstra overraskelse er det Samuel har forberedt til dagens gjester?

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 313
programme.desc: Det er en ny uke på Camp Kulinaris og deltakerne spekulerer i hvem som skal lede gruppa denne uka. Når Kjartan kommer har han ikke bare med en, men to store overraskelser til deltakerne.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 312
programme.desc: Det er konkurransedag på Camp Kulinaris, og en deltaker må reise hjem. Siden gruppen ikke fikk serveringen godkjent denne uka er Johanna førstelærling.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 901
programme.desc: Sommeren sparkes i gang, og det er tid for å møte reiselystne nordmenn som gleder seg til å kjenne på sydenvarmen igjen; Hilde bobler over av entusiasme fordi hun endelig skal tilbake på charterferie.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 907
programme.desc: Christian er ikke spesielt fornøyd med å dele hotellrom med moren, og jobber hardt for å få et eget rom med sjøutsikt.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1028
programme.desc: Damene i gjengen fra Buskerud arrangerer utdrikningslag for Tove som skal gifte seg med Rune i morgen. Familien Gude bruker dagen på shopping og strandkos. Radio Kvinesdal er på karneval.

programme.title: Charterfeber After Beach: Episode 101
programme.desc: I første episode blir vi kjent med Fetsund-gutta. Disse seks kompisene satser knallhardt på fyll, fest og galskap i Syden. Det blir også et gjensyn med Mario og Marthe, kjent fra Paradise hotel 2019.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1108
programme.desc: Svein prøver å imponere Lillian med en egenkomponert veganmiddag. Lars og teatervennene drar på Volvo-verksted, mens Håkon skal prøve seg som drag-queen, til Bibbis store begeistring.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1111
programme.desc: Iselin og Jørgen prøver seg på hinderløype til vanns. Onkel Erling og Stein Are har endelig kommet fram etter lastebilturen, men det tar ikke lang tid før et nytt problem dukker opp.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 1104
programme.desc: Vi byr på en oppussing utenom det vanlige. «Odden» eies av sykepleierne i Vestland og drives på dugnad. Dette gjør at gutta føler ekstra stort press på å levere. Vil de klare å skape et godt resultat?

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 1105
programme.desc: Sør for Femunden ligger Femundsundet, og midt i skogen ligger et hyttetun. For å komme seg hit må man ta en privat gondol over elva. Isak byr på reinsdyr-delikatesser, og Rune lager et tre-telt.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing
programme.desc: Midt på Ørskogfjellet I Sjøholt ligger en hytte som tidligere var eid av Røde Kors. Nå eies den av Runa som savner en gjennomgående stil på hytta. Stil skal hun få, og gutta har industrielle planer!

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 1107
programme.desc: Omkranset av skog og elv finner vi årets syvende hytte. Familien som eier hytta syns den er direkte upersonlig og ukoselig, og en slik utfordring tar Halvor på strak arm.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing
programme.desc: Sesongs siste episode byr på påskestemning i Setesdal. Her gjør gutta om på planløsningen for å få utnyttet plassen bedre, og det blir også tid til litt isfiske.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 101
programme.desc: Interiørdesigner Halvor Bakke drar på tur til Todalen, med de nevedyktige kameratene Mikkel, Gustav og Thomas, for å pusse opp en klassisk seter i idylliske Trollheimen.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2306
programme.desc: Pengene til 27-åringen Ole André, som bor på Haslum, går unna til dyr elektronikk og gaming. Han kjøpte også like godt en Tesla på impuls. Kan Lene og Hallgeir hjelpe han med å få styr på økonomien?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2307
programme.desc: Småbarnsforeldrene Martin og Line fra Tromøya sliter hele tiden med at pengene ikke strekker til. Drømmen om å kunne kjøpe sitt eget hjem virker fjern, men kanskje Hallgeir og Magne kan hjelpe dem ut av den økonomiske krisen?

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2308
programme.desc: For en del år siden kastet Raymond bort store beløp på byturer, fest, poker og reiser. Nå har han begynt med en ny og bedre livsstil med løpe- og fjellturer, men befinner seg fortsatt på bunnen økonomisk.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2401
programme.desc: Cecilie er kjent fra dokumentaren «The Tinder Swindler». I 2018 matchet hun med Simon Leviev på Tinder og ble svindlet for flere millioner kroner. Nå sitter Cecilie igjen med en gjeld som hun aldri har brukt en krone av selv.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2402
programme.desc: Julie og Joacim fra Tønsberg sliter med impulskjøp på kreditt, og har mistet fullstendig oversikt over egen økonomi. De drukner i skyhøye forbrukslån, betalingsanmerkninger og inkassokrav – som setter en stopper for en livsviktig drøm for paret.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2403
programme.desc: Råneren Mathias fra Bergen er en svoren bilentusiast, og med denne dyre hobbyen – i kombinasjon med høyt forbruk – har inkassokravene nå virkelig begynt å ta han igjen. Når han i tillegg sliter med å holde på jobber, har samboeren nå sett seg lei.

programme.title: South Park: Noe du kan gjøre med fingeren din
programme.desc: Guttene danner boybandet 'Fingerbang' og får spillejobb på kjøpesenteret.

programme.title: South Park: SUPERHARD PK-het
programme.desc: Det har aldri vært mer utfordrende å være rektor PK.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman suger
programme.desc: Butters blir sett i en kompromitterende stilling med Cartman og sendes til omvendingsleir for homofile. Cartman prøver å få tilbake et bilde av det som skjedde.

programme.title: South Park: Gjennom ræv og ild
programme.desc: 'Svartefredag' nærmer seg og kampen om spillkonsollene blir mer intens - og siden prinsessen Kenny svek Cartman, er han ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Sykkelparaden
programme.desc: Guttenes vinnersjanse i sykkelparaden settes på spill når Kenny trekker seg.

programme.title: South Park: Kaptein Tjukkskjegg
programme.desc: Cartman har hørt om alle de rikdommene som blir plyndret av pirater i Somalia, så han setter en lapp over øyet og sleper gjengen med til Afrika for å få en bit av kaka.

programme.title: South Park: Fattig og dum
programme.desc: Cartmans nye ambisjon her i livet er at han vil bli en NASCAR-kjører. Klarer Cartman å vinne sitt livs race?

programme.title: South Park: Sexhjelpen
programme.desc: Kyle og Butters befinner seg midt blant Amerikas superkjendiser når de gjennomgår en behandling for sexavhengighet. Cartman og Stan er limt til Tiger Woods-kampen.

programme.title: South Park: Mitt fremtidige meg
programme.desc: South Park blir rammet av en kraftig storm, og en naken fremmed påstår at han er Stan fra fremtiden.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemispesial
programme.desc: Det går opp for Randy hvilken betydning han har for koronautbruddet etter hvert som pandemien gir innbyggerne i South Park stadig nye utfordringer.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 220
programme.desc: Det blir vinn eller forsvinn under kuppelen når det skal avsløres hvem som gjemmer seg bak klovnemasken.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 221
programme.desc: Hvem blir spilt ut under kveldens partnerseremoni?

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 222
programme.desc: Det blir en leken uke når deltagerne blir delt opp i to lag, og må kjempe om å imponere den nye gjesten.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 223
programme.desc: Embla nyter makten hun har denne uken når deltagerne skrur opp temperaturen med et råne- og ragge-show!

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 224
programme.desc: Embla jobber for å velge allianse, og et emosjonelt valg må tas når en deltager skal sjekke ut.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 225
programme.desc: En superskurk går løs og setter én etter én av superheltene i fare. Det bygges opp til sjalusidrama når Polestar bruker sine forføreriske evner.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 226
programme.desc: Superskurken herjer videre på resorten, og fire superhelter skal ut på et superhemmelig oppdrag. Øyvind og Natalia fortsetter å gjøre hverandre sjalu...

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt I Arboga
programme.desc: Jompen är bjuden på drevjakt utanför Arboga. Det visar sig vara fullt av kronhjort på markerna.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt På Bäver - Bäventyret
programme.desc: Jompen och Filip ger sig ut i vildmarken för att jaga bäver.

programme.title: Vilterian: Vildsvinsschnitzel
programme.desc: Denna vecka i Vilterian lagas pankofriterad vildsvinsschnitzel med sardellsmör och krämig potatissallad med vårens primör.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Två Dagars Jakt
programme.desc: Pierre ger sig ut på drevjakt med siktet inställt på rådjur och dovhjort. Det blir två fantastiska dagar i januarisolen, häng med!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Bock Och Duvjakt
programme.desc: Jompen åker till Blommeröd i Skåne för att jaga och käka med matgeniet Calle.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Älgjakt I Jämtland
programme.desc: Jompen och Pierre åker upp till nordvästra Jämtland och jagar älg. Fredrik Myhr hälsar oss välkomna till en fantastisk jakt och en otrolig miljö.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakten För Alla & Jakt På Kronhjort I Skottland
programme.desc: Jompen och Video-Victor har blivit inbjudna på en väldigt spännande älgjakt i Hamra. Jakten för Alla är ett initiativ startat av Jonas Johansson för att funktionshindrade ska kunna komma ut och jaga.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Pierre Testar Nyheter Från Chevalier
programme.desc: Häng med när Pierre får sig en ordentlig genomgång av Chevaliers nyheter till jaktgarderoben!

programme.title: Danish Fight Night: København - Maj 2024
programme.desc: Se bl.a. Dina Thorslunds titelforsvar med en dobbelt VM-kamp ved Danish Fight Night i Royal Arena fra d. 25. maj 2024.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: Changes in Attitudes

programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien

programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman finner kjærligheten
programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.desc: Scott Malkinson prøver desperat å imponere den nye jenta i klassen.

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1107

programme.title: Fangene på Fortet NO: Episode 1108

programme.desc: Guttene konkurrerer mot hjemmeunderviste barn i South Parks årlige stavekonkurranse.

programme.desc: Cartmans blir sjalu når Kenny får det siste nye bærbare spillet før lekebutikkene går tomme. Vil Cartman og Kenny kunne forbli bestevenner for alltid?

programme.title: South Park: Midtbyen
programme.desc: South Parks bykjerne holder på å oppgraderes og Kenny bestemmer bestemmer seg for at det er på tide å skaffe en jobb.

programme.title: South Park: Døden
programme.desc: Stans bestefar prøver å lure guttene til å drepe ham. Foreldrene i South Park prøver å få stanset sendingene av 'Terrance and Phillip'.

programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.desc: Cartman drømmer at han møter et romvesen, men de andre guttene er sikre på at drømmen var virkelighet.

programme.desc: En fryktelig dopingskandale ryster alle i troen på et elsket ikon. Alle som en gang støttet den falne helten, klipper av seg sine gule armbånd.

programme.title: South Park: Rumpeburgere

programme.title: South Park: Eric Cartmans død

programme.title: Boomerang: Game Night
programme.desc: Bryson arrangerer en spillekveld for gjengen, men moroa forvandles snart til sjalusi når Simone konsentrerer seg om en uventet gjest. David og Crystal treffer hverandre for første gang siden skilsmissen.

programme.title: Boomerang: Power

programme.title: Games People Play: Pilot

programme.title: Games People Play: Lover's Moon
programme.desc: Nia intervjuer Laila om historien. Laila bekrefter at mannen på bildene er Marcus King. Nia informerer Vanessa om artikkelen som holder på å bli utgitt. Kareem forteller Marcus at Jamal sliter med spillegjeld.

programme.title: Games People Play: The Drink of Kings
programme.desc: Marcus og Vanessa gå til rådgiver. Nia og MJ kjemper for å komme seg etter tapet av Laila-historien. Laila arrangerer privatfester for Roxanne og blir venn med Susie Q. Susie inviterer Laila til en snobbete begivenhet.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: Mixed Messages
