programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' triller Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran ut på skumruller i 'Fatal foam', tar begrepet "hot date" til neste nivå med 'Ildfulle utekvelder' og kommer litt for nær de verste flysetenaboene i 'Ekle passasjerer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' leker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran utryddere i 'Kryppatruljen', blir spesielt følsomme og feller 'Kjærlighetstårer' og skater ute i det ville i 'Bli i parken'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der
programme.desc: Abyss har smittet Beka. Mannskapet må finne en måte å redde henne på.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forkortelse av djevelens skille
programme.desc: Etter at noe av mannskapet er fanget, blir Harper tvunget til å jobbe på en tidsbro for patriarken.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stoler på Gordian Maze
programme.desc: En spion fra Tri Gemma dukker opp på Andromeda i et forsøk på å stjele stjernekartet.

programme.title: Andromeda: En symmetri av ufullkommenhet
programme.desc: Når Rommie blir for emosjonell, kutter skipet hennes tilgang til diagnostikk.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tid ute av sinn
programme.desc: Abyss dreper Bekas venn, og mannskapet må finne ut hvilken informasjon de drepte for.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dissonantintervallet (del 1)
programme.desc: Andromeda redder et skip som returnerer fra fredsforhandlinger med Magog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, In Deed
programme.desc: It was a tragic twist of fate. Just days after a woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: In 1996, Virginia Beach police arrive at the Makdessi apartment to find the bloodied bodies of Elise Makdessi and Navy sailor Quincy Brown. But was Brown Elise's lover or her assailant?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing with the Devil
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Russian Roulette, Anthrax, Friendly Ghost, Update: Vanished in the Heartland and Scare Tactics.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fugitive R.N., Witness for the Prosecution, Doris Duke, Update: NY State Serial Rapist, Gone Fishing and Miracle Child.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Road Map Clues, Past Phone Calls, Miracle Cross, She Finds Fugitives and Phone Call Sister.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Singles Bar, Mary Celeste, Drug Playboy, Update: Coffee Pot Twins, Lost Gause, Update: Li'l Miss and Mystery Baby.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Arizona Souvenir Killer, Amish Hostage Murder, Coin Scam, Postal Crime, Real Dr. Doolittle and Unknown Mom.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Held For Ransom
programme.desc: Wealth has its rewards, but it also brings its dangers. Kidnapping is one of them. No ordeal is more horrifying for a family than to have a child taken.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own "fingerprint", allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Deadly Smile
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Misplaced Loyalty
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Poltergeist House
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate a Poltergeist haunting a homeowner who is a wits end. Poltergeistal activity in the home is terrorizing the tenant and paranormal investigators Bex and Sean are about to start the exorcism of this demonic entity away for good.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Have Many Lovers
programme.desc: Today, Rufus comes clean about cheating on Treynae with Cheeta and Rhonda tells her girlfriend Lovette that she's in an affair with another woman! Who will choose whom?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Wife Discovers Husband's Secret Family
programme.desc: Ron left Stacie when she was 8 months pregnant with his child for Audrey and thought he'd found his soul mate. Are Stacie's kids all his? Watch this classic showdown today!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Jerry Rescues An Obese Man
programme.desc: Denny weighs over 800 pounds and has been unable to leave his bed for the past 5 weeks and is ready to change his life. Today we follow Denny's courageous journey.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Woman In Labor Confronts Mistress
programme.desc: The first time Nancy, Tara and Versell appeared on the show, Nancy was pregnant with Versell's baby. He was cheating on her with Tara and now she's pregnant! Who will go?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Jerry is joined by Santa and his elves to answer 7 very special Christmas letters from needy children. Watch these happy faces light up when their holiday wishes are granted!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: You Won't Marry Your Gay Lover!
programme.desc: Friends and family refuse to accept same sex marriage! Martin won’t let his son marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back, but he’s in love with a man! Who has the final say?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 010
programme.desc: Joe Valachi, a Mafia hitman, broke the code of silence, revealing the names of bosses and exposing the Mafia's $40 billion empire, sparking a national reckoning and empowering the FBI to escalate their battle against organized crime.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 011
programme.desc: This is the story of how Mafia serial killer Roy DeMeo evaded New York's law enforcement while allegedly committing up to 200 murders, operating under the protection of "Nino" Gaggi in the Gambino crime family.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 012
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky, the enigmatic Jewish-American gangster, evaded legal charges throughout his life, accumulating wealth through gambling and influential alliances, yet leaving little behind upon his death.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 013
programme.desc: Robert Kubecka and Donald Barstow, courageous garbage collection entrepreneurs, defied the Mafia's grip on Long Island, aiding in a landmark prosecution that exposed mob leadership and marked a turning point in the fight against organized crime.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A retired businessman travels from England to Florida to visit his family but dies soon after arriving. Dr. G must now determine what mysteriously killed this healthy man so suddenly.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Amanda Reese breaks out in hives and begins to hyperventilate after returning from a Hurricane Katrina relief effort. Dr. G wonders if an infection caused this young woman’s untimely death.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Unusual Australian Shark Arm Murder
programme.desc: Follow along as hosts Ryan and Shane go down under to examine a shark, a speedboat, and a mysterious severed arm.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Suspicious Case of the Reykjavik Confessions
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss six people who confessed to murders that don't seem to have ever occurred.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Shocking Florida Machete Murder / The Puzzling Disappearance of Walter Collins
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss the Florida machete murder and what became of the missing boy named Walter Collins.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: The Sentinel Spirit
programme.desc: Nick contacts the spirit of a sentinel that's been protecting a room where Civil War veterans gathered.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Greenville Manor
programme.desc: Nick investigates Greenville Manor, a 141-year-old Victorian manor, with an unexplained supernatural presence.

programme.title: Death Walker with Nick Groff: Nikola Tesla Building
programme.desc: Nick and medium Tessa DelZoppo contact workers who died building the Edward Dean Adams Power Station.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: Når to studenter på sporet av det haitiske korset i Utu forsvinner i New Orleans, går Sydney og Nigel ned på bukten for å finne dem.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er på tur, så Claudia bestemmer seg for å hjelpe Sydneys venn Roger med å finne Julius Cæsars rustning, men relikktjakt er ikke hennes talent.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bunker Hill
programme.desc: Dylan og hans nye Commonwealth-flåte tar på seg Drago-Kazov-flåten, men synes den er mye større enn forventet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ouroboros
programme.desc: Magog-eggene i Harper begynner å klekkes, så teamet bygger en Tesseract-maskin

programme.title: Andromeda: Lava og raketter
programme.desc: Dylan overtar en turistpram i et forsøk på å unnslippe leiesoldater.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: The CBS Evening News team shares the day's stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to the world.

programme.title: CBS Evening News

programme.title: On the Case: Pattern of Violence
programme.desc: A 22 year old real estate agent is discovered strangled to death inside a model home she was trying to sell.

programme.title: On the Case: Field of Nightmares
programme.desc: A young mother and son are found shot to death in a quiet Texas field. Would a mysterious bag left at the crime scene hold the key to catching their killer?

programme.title: On the Case: Snake in the Grass
programme.desc: A cloud of smoke leads two truckers to a shocking discovery; the smoldering remains of a teenage girl.

programme.title: On the Case: Fatal Turn
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes on her way home from work. Her disappearance sends police into the darkest corners of the state and our justice system.

programme.title: On the Case: A Stranger's Knock
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a house fire they discover a woman shot and killed inside. Police must unlock the mystery of who started the blaze to solve the murder.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Top of the World
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and new senior manager Duane to work things out.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts. But his over- zealous efforts result in a clash with the crew and with Joe, and a down-to-the-wire midnight departure to meet a deadline.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Doghouse
programme.desc: Duane's decision to leave the Electra crew unsupervised while he spends time at home jeopardizes the completion of a major contract, and could cost him his job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Strip
programme.desc: Mechanic Jimmy is sent to a northern mining camp to create an ice landing strip on a remote lake where AJ will have to land a DC-3 and the much bigger C-46.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Christine Taylor, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mikel Welch, Eitan Bernath, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "The Talk" Hosts, Drew's News
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" Natalie Morales, Jerry O'Connell, Sheryl Underwood, Akbar Gbaja-Biamila and Amanda Kloots are joining Drew and taking on the final five to answer rapid fire questions about themselves!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with "The Talk" Hosts
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Sheryl Underwood, Drew's News
programme.desc: "The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Stephanie Izard, Eve Rodsky, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics. Stephanie Izard is joining Drew in the kitchen to make something delicious. Eve Rodsky is sharing home equity tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Melissa Rivers, Law Roach, Christian Siriano
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Eva Longoria, Drew's News with Lewis Howes
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dylan Mulvaney
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "Drewber" with Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera, Drew's News with Tony Dokoupil

programme.title: Cops: Hide and Go Porch
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed "Danger" is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes . A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.

programme.title: Cops: Alleycat
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: Cops: Victoria's New Secret
programme.desc: Deputies observe a woman stuff drugs into her bra. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.

programme.title: Cops: Apologies Detective
programme.desc: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to an arguing couple. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.

programme.title: Cops: It's Laundry Day
programme.desc: Deputies detain a man when a gun falls from his pantleg. Deputies are called when a father spits on his son's girlfriend. Officers respond when a child is bitten by two large dogs.

programme.title: Cops: Nothing Upstairs
programme.desc: Officers pursue a motorcyclist driving erratically. Deputies find broken drug paraphernalia in a car when conducting a traffic stop. A man who beat up his girlfriend hides from officers in an attic.

programme.title: Cops: Follow Me to the River
programme.desc: A deputy jumps into a waterway to arrest a fleeing suspect. Officers respond to roommates in an argument. Officers are called when two crossdressers attack a group of women.

programme.title: Cops: Hiding the Evidence
programme.desc: A drug dealer swallows something suspicious as deputies move in to arrest him. Deputies pull over a father with his son in the car. A woman files a kidnapping report against her own boyfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Blame my Man
programme.desc: A man runs from police claiming he heard a gunshot. A woman lays the blame on her boyfriend. Officers confront a man who refuses to come down from a roof.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair
programme.desc: On the night of April 16, 2013, Anaïs Guillaume, 21, mysteriously disappears in Fromy (Ardennes) after spending the evening at her companion's farm.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 607
programme.desc: Den 7. april 2017 var Stockholm den neste i rekken av hovedstader som ble utsatt for terrorhandlinger. I denne episoden følger vi politiets ekstremt intense jakt på terroristen Rakhmat Akilov.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103
programme.desc: To turgåere finner et utbrent lik på et bål langs en øde skogsbilvei på Veståsen i Søndre Land. I flere uker står politiet helt uten svar på hvem som kan stå bak den groteske handlingen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Blue Scorpion
programme.desc: The emergence of the elusive Blue Scorpion leads anthropology professor Jeff Storck (Chris O'Dowd) to his most personal research project yet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Blurryman
programme.desc: Writer Sophie Gelson (Zazie Beetz) is haunted by a mysterious figure. Seth Rogen and Betty Gabriel guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare at 20,000 Feet
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Kind of a Stopwatch
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Living Doll
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Meet in the Middle
programme.desc: Lonely bachelor Phil (Jimmi Simpson) finds meaningful human connection when he discovers a telepathic link to a stranger named Annie (Gillian Jacobs). Their connection quickly sparks a romance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Downtime
programme.desc: After a recent promotion to hotel manager, Michelle (Morena Baccarin) feels like she's on top of the world, but any cause for celebration is short lived when the nature of her reality is called into question. Colman Domingo and Tony Hale also guest star.

programme.desc: Ed Helms is an actor and comedian whose credits include "The Office" and the "The Hangover" trilogy.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Freezer unit filled with 135 million pounds of ice cream; Alcor, where researchers keep cadavers on ice in hopes of future revival.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: Allies turn the tide in the Atlantic, where initially German U-Boats harass freely convoys to supply Britain. The route to bring American soldiers who will land on D-Day is clear.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Inside Man
programme.desc: Chaim Rumkowski, leader of the Lodz ghetto during WWII, believed cooperation with the Nazis could save lives, providing labor in exchange for food. This approach kept some semblance of community and culture alive amidst unimaginable horror.

programme.title: Secret War: The Special Interrogation Group
programme.desc: The SIG consisted of German speaking Jewish volunteers from Palestine. They had a highly dangerous job: which was to pose as Germans behind enemy lines and extract intelligence and do acts of sabotage. Few had a long-life expectancy.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's failed attacks in the Mediterranean region draw in the Germans.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: End Game
programme.desc: In January 1945, Nazi Germany faces defeat as Allied armies close in. Hitler, aged 55 and in poor health, remains defiant in his Berlin bunker. On April 30th, 1945, Hitler commits suicide, and days later, Germany surrenders, ending World War II.

programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: iCarly: Stjernehjelp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie skal lage en musikkvideo til en popstjernes comeback, oppdager de at popstjernen er ute av form og talentløs. Og Spencer oppdager at kvinnen han dater er Gibbys mor.

programme.title: iCarly: Livredderen
programme.desc: Når Freddie redder livet til Carly, forelsker Carly seg i ham. Sam og Spencer kjemper mot hverandre i et painball-spill som heter Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.

programme.title: iCarly: Missekonkurransen
programme.desc: Sam avslører overfor Carly og Freddie at hun deltok i skjønnhetskonkurranser som liten. Da hun finner ut at hennes rival skal konkurrere i Seattle, overbeviser hun Carly om å stille opp mot henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: Etter at Sam plutselig må i fengsel, lover Carly og Freddie dyrt og hellig å ikke avlyse nettshowet ettersom faren hennes skal se det. Carly ber Spencer om hjelp, men det blir vanskelig, for han skal på date.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: En eksentrisk millionær ber Carly og vennene hennes om å sende det første nettshowet fra det ytre rom, så de må prøves ut for en romreise. Imens besøker en merkelig liten pike Spencer hjemme i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddie flytter ut
programme.desc: Freddie bestemmer seg for å flytte ut av leiligheten sin etter at moren hans har gjort ham flau. Carly, Sam og Freddie starter et firma og spesialiserer seg på bilder av kjæledyr.

programme.title: iCarly: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: Når en hetebølge rammer Seattle og strømmen går, kommer Spencer til unnsetning med et norsk klimaanlegg.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: De medvirkende introduserer bloopers og bortklipte scener fra serien.

programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey and Libby are paired together for a school project.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Pom-Pom Incident
programme.desc: Sabrina's good intentions go bad when she prevents Valerie from trying out for the cheerleading squad.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Pancake Madness
programme.desc: An addiction to pancakes threatens to send Sabrina’s life spinning out of control.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Good Will Haunting
programme.desc: Halloween turns truly frightful when a demented doll takes charge of the festivities.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: You Bet Your Family
programme.desc: Salem’s gambling debts get the best of him, but its Sabrina and her aunts who pay the price.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: And The Sabrina Goes To
programme.desc: A spell to get her just desserts leaves Sabrina with egg on her face instead.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Nobody Nose * Libby Like Sabrina Knows * Libby
programme.desc: An out-of-control magic spaceship lands Sabrina and Salem inside Libby’s brain.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and The Beast
programme.desc: In order to teach Sabrina a lesson about love and beauty, Harvey is turned into a beast.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Christmas Amnesia
programme.desc: It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas until Sabrina accidentally erases the holiday

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Whose So-Called Life is it Anyway?
programme.desc: Sabrina’s charitable magic turns out to be anything but a good deed.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Little Man on Campus
programme.desc: Alex is thrilled to be taking a college course taught by one of his personal heroes, Professor Ephraim Bronski. In his eagerness to impress the teacher he gets off to a bad start and is humiliated by his idol when he fails the first-class assignment.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Best Man
programme.desc: Alex cannot accept the fact that he and everyone around him are growing up and desperately clings to his old ways.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Keaton and Son
programme.desc: Alex reluctantly accepts a part-time job with his father at the non-profit station, and his dad is bursting with pride to have him following in his footsteps.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Don't Kiss Me, I'm Only The Messenger
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Love Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Little Jennifer is thrilled about getting a visit from her former neighborhood pal, Scott, whom she hasn't seen in five years.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Hotline Fever
programme.desc: As an economics student, Alex finds it demeaning to be forced into a public service position, but his experiences at the crisis center give him a new outlook on life.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Help Wanted
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Fem i familien: 4 RMS OCN VU
programme.desc: While Steven and Elyse are away on vacation, Mallory accidentally crashes her parents' car into a telephone pole. The kids need to raise money for auto repairs and decides to turn the Keaton house into a hotel.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Karen 11, Alex 0
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Auntie Up
programme.desc: Mallory is crushed when her favorite aunt dies suddenly, but her feelings of sadness turn to anger when family and friends at the funeral seem to be taking Aunt Trudy's death too lightly.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Branding
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan utforsker opplevelsen som sort collegestudent og snylterne som suksess medfører. Andre sketsjer inkluderer et nabolags reaksjon på et mystisk vesen, når man kan - og ikke kan - si et kontroversielt ord.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Airplane Showdown
programme.desc: En flyvert må håndtere en passasjer som ikke vil ha på sikkerhetsbeltet, britiske oppdagelsesreisende diskuterer sine reiser, to par forsøker å unngå spoilere på en dobbeltdate og en bibelgruppe opplever en guddommelig intervensjon.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: En vampyr avslører seg selv, en seriemorder blir forhindret og et barn får ønsket sitt oppfylt.

programme.title: Key & Peele: A Cappella Club
programme.desc: En PSA jobber med barnesoldater i Afrika, en college-a-cappella-gruppe får et nytt medlem, Meegan og André går på sin første date, en terrorgruppe har en matbil og to gamle menn diskuterer popmusikk.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Cunnilingus Class
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Mr. T lærer oss livsleksjoner, Wendell har bruk for en ny seng og en fornærmelse som går over streken.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at kara har en dårlig Skype-forbindelse, en Django Unchained-slavekamp og en baseballspiller som klasker for mange rumper.

programme.title: Broad City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Ilana prøver å tjene litt ekstra penger i 'temp game'. Abbi lover naboen sin å vente på pakken hans, men hun går glipp av leveransen og må dra til verdens ende for å få fatt i den.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: Broad City: P*$$Y Weed
programme.desc: Jentene må bli voksne! Abbi vil kjøpe sin egen marihuana, som en voksen kvinne, mens Ilana må takle skatten på egen hånd. Og, jentene er høye som hus.

programme.title: Broad City: Fattest Asses
programme.desc: Når Abbi innser at hun er for snill, blir hun mere bitchy. Ilana bestemmer seg for å nå sitt fulle potential. De går på en eksklusiv fest og møter noen eventyrlige DJ-er. Nå kan ingenting gå galt.

programme.title: Broad City: Hurricane Wanda
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana klarer sig igennem stormen med hjælp fra deres venner (Jaimé, Lincoln og Jeremy), men de får desværre selskab af Bevers og hans søster. Et spil 'Who Done It?' udspiller sig, mens orkanan raser udenfor.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: Der dukker opp nye muligheter når Abbi endelig kan trene noen på Soulstice og Ilana gjør suksess som firmasjef.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: Broad City: Knockoffs
programme.desc: Abbi og Jeremy går på en date som ender med en overraskelse. Ilana og hennes mor leter etter den perfekte håndvesken.

programme.title: Broad City: Hashtag FOMO
programme.desc: Jentene leter etter den perfekte fest, noe som avslører en underlig og surrealistisk side av Abbi, som igjen bekrefter Ilanas verste anelser.

programme.title: Broad City: Citizen Ship
programme.desc: Gjengen skal feire at Jaime har blitt amerikansk statsborger, men Bevers fører Abbi og Ilana på avveier med å love dem gratis sprit. Imens må Lincoln og Jaime klare seg selv blandt alle advokatene.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Couple's Therapy
programme.desc: Wiegel and Williams work on their communication at couples therapy when Wiegel's insurance dries up.

programme.title: RENO 911!: How We Do It in Reno
programme.desc: Dejected after a day of unsuccessful crime fighting, Officer Dangle rear-ends a civilian and discovers 60 pounds of marijuana in the first episode of this iconic comedy series.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Fireworks
programme.desc: When the Mayor's kid blows his thumb off with an illegal explosive, the officers are put on the line to rid Reno of contraband fireworks.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Execution Tickets
programme.desc: The deputies partake in a scavenger hunt to determine who gets to attend the execution of a convicted felon, and Williams gives a suspect a makeover.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clementine's Pregnant
programme.desc: A mandatory staff drug test reveals a surprise pregnancy, and Lt. Dangle has a brush with a celebrity.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jones Gets Suspended
programme.desc: Jones enjoys some unexpected perks after being relegated to crossing guard duty, and Dangle's bike is stolen again.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Help From the FBI
programme.desc: While the FBI investigates a Reno homicide, members of the Sheriff's Department put their best feet forward.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel Suicide Watch
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department lavishes attention on Wiegel after her failed suicide attempt, and Williams and Garcia hook up.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clementine Gets Married
programme.desc: Clemmy's degenerate boyfriend Steed surprises everyone when he asks her to marry him.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Garcia's Anniversary
programme.desc: The guys hit a strip club to celebrate Garcia's 15-year anniversary on the force.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World & Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines a "Real World" season with an all-black cast and one super-white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Piss on You & The World's Greatest Wars
programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 617
programme.desc: Daniel møter den eneste mannen i verden som liker damesport, går på lag med en opprydder på kontoret og feirer tilbakekomsten av "Er det rasistisk?"

programme.title: Tosh.0: 618
programme.desc: Tosh snakker med Vine-gangsta Bryan Silva, Big Ass Baby havner i en bedriten situasjon og Daniel lekker ut nakenbilder av fansene sine.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 619
programme.desc: Brooklyns groveste hundeekspert får gjenoppreisning, Daniel gir oss hverdagstips og "Tosh.0" nyter sommerens siste grillfest.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 620
programme.desc: En tenåring med hjertesorg får gjenoppreisning, en forførelseskunstens mester gir oss tips om hvordan man får til en trekant og Daniel avslører det ritualet han utfører før hvert program.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 621
programme.desc: Verdens verste vektløfter får nettgjenoppreisning, Daniel leker "Er det rasitisk?" og "Tosh.0"-fans ødelegger tingene sine.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 622
programme.desc: Daniel blir storebroren til en fyr og svarer på spørsmål fra barn.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 623
programme.desc: To rappere som nesten ikke kan lese tar noen beats, fotballtreneren Lane Kiffin mislykkes igjen og Daniel undersøker hvordan rulletrapper kan være sensuelle.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 624
programme.desc: Daniel undersøker hvordan det har gått med tidligere nettgjenoppreisninger, utforsker menneskekroppens mange hull og forteller om en ny måte å ødelegge sin økonomi på.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 625
programme.desc: Daniel gir en rødtopp som har fått bank av Moder Jord nettgjenoppreisning, redder USAs ungdom fra fordømmelse og får skremmende tweets fra sine fans, akkurat i tide til Halloween.

programme.title: Tosh.0: 626
programme.desc: Daniel forteller "kysseteorien" til et par intim-coacher, gir oss råd før neste gang vi skal knulle skitne ludder og prøver å stoppe respektløse kommentarer til kvinner.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to convince an insecure Del(Eric Lutes) that he has the potential to be a great parent after Del is shocked to discover that he is the father of a 10-year old girl.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Julia (Sofia Milos) tells Caroline (Lea Thompson) that it’s not easy being on the outside of her close working relationship with Richard (Malcolm Gets), Caroline quickly, and mysteriously, learns what it’s like to walk a mile in Julia’s shoes.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline (Lea Thompson) struggles with commitment issues over Trevor, Richard(Malcolm Gets) inadvertently causes a rift between Caroline and her new beau.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is insulted by a local cabbie, Adamo, she takes her case to higher powers at the travel commission. Meanwhile, Richard, frustrated by a “painter’s block,” becomes obsessed with computers when he joins a cyber cafe.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline’s (Lea Thompson)mother, Margaret Duffy (guest star Edie McClurg, “The Hogan Family”), visits Caroline for a mother-daughter People magazine shoot, tensions rise over unexpressed feelings.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) must hire a new cartoon colorist when Richard (Malcolm Gets) finally quits after he and Julia (Sofia Milos) move into their glamorous new home.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: The fourth-season opener finds Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) savoring their first passionate kiss and preparing for romance.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Vengeful father-in-law Mr. Mazzone strips Richard (Malcolm Gets) of all his worldly possessions, forcing Richard to take temporary refuge in Caroline's (Lea Thompson) new office, where he runs afoul of Plum, the no-nonsense office manager.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Caroline (Lea Thompson) inadvertently offends office manager Plum (guest star Nancy Lenehan, "Grace Under Fire"), she and Richard (Malcolm Gets) are banished to a damp, dark basement office.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets into a passionate discussion about faith in the power of God versus medicine with a Priest and Jake, Reggie and Bob take a stab at the stock market.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie has a panic attack about where her life is going and Becker confesses that he misses Elizabeth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker assesses his feelings for Liz when she is offered a new job in Chicago and Linda breaks-up with Gil for lying to her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's four attempts to watch the same movie are annoyingly interrupted, Reggie goes back to school and Hattie discovers her husband's infidelity. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is in an awkward situation when his building super is found dead of natural causes

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker had an ethical decision to make with one of his patients and Reggie is proposed to on her second date with a man. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is a mentor to a student and Reggie, Bob and Jake come to a standstill in their friendship. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is accused of being a creature of habit and as a result, tries a new restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker runs into an old flame and fights with his conscience to spend the night with her because she's a married woman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has made a resolution to quit smoking and he announces it to everyone at the diner.
